zh-tw.title: 考試語錄大集合
zh-tw.description: 從會考、學測到分科測驗，每一個熬夜畫重點的考生都懂的崩潰自嘲，廢文文學考場版

en.title: Exam Mood Quotes
en.description: For everyone who has stared at a question paper longer than at their crush — relatable lines for exam season survivors

items.sourceNote: Dcard 考試板 自嘲常見句式 — 想交卷 register

zh-tw.content:
監考老師：「還有十分鐘。」
我：「沒事，我比答案紙更想交卷。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 考完隨手 po Threads 或考前發限動的標準句型，朋友秒按愛心。
variations: 進階版：「還有十分鐘」→「來得及把名字再寫一次。」
也能換成：「還有十分鐘，但我心已經離開考場二十分鐘了。」

en.content:
Proctor: "Ten minutes left."
Me: "That's fine, I wanted to leave forty minutes ago."
en.editorNote: Drop this on Threads right after walking out of the exam — group chat will reply with crying-laughing reacts.
variations: Heavier version: "Ten minutes left" — "Just enough time to rewrite my name in cursive."

items.sourceNote: PTT 高中板 夜讀感嘆 register — 三千頁 vs 三秒鐘 對照

zh-tw.content:
夜讀三千頁，進考場三秒鐘忘光。
果然書讀進腦袋的方法，跟記憶離開腦袋的方法是同一條路。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考前一夜的 IG 限動專用，配個哭著翻課本的照片更有戲。
variations: 也可以說：「我背了一整年，考卷只用了一秒鐘證明它白費了。」

en.content:
Stayed up reading three thousand pages. Forgot all of it in three seconds at the exam hall.
Turns out the road in and the road out are the same road.
en.editorNote: Caption it under a pic of your textbook stack — instant relatable post for finals week.
variations: Shorter take: "My brain has excellent in-and-out service. Drive-thru memory."

items.sourceNote: Dcard 重考板 應屆 vs 重考 對照句型

zh-tw.content:
應屆生：今年好難。
重考生：每年都這樣。
在重考的應屆生：所以我現在到底算誰？
zh-tw.editorNote: 重考生群組必傳，下面留言一定排成一條長長的⋯⋯接龍。
variations: 再加一行：「在重考又考差的應屆生：請把我從這個句型移除。」

en.content:
First-timer: "This year is so hard."
Resit student: "Every year is like this."
Resit student who's still failing: "So which one am I supposed to be?"
en.editorNote: Drop in your study group chat — silence, then a wave of "why are you calling me out" memes.
variations: Extension: "Resit student resitting the resit: please remove me from this comparison."

items.sourceNote: 考試焦慮療癒 register — 答錯也沒關係 frame

zh-tw.content:
答錯也沒關係。
反正人生有更多題目，本來就沒有答案。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考完安慰朋友的標配句，不會說「沒關係」就用這句，比較有層次。
variations: 可以延伸：「人生這張考卷，我寫到一半才發現它根本沒有解答本。」

en.content:
It's okay if you got the answer wrong.
Life has way more questions, and most of them never had a right answer to begin with.
en.editorNote: The grown-up version of "don't worry about it" — send it to a friend who's spiraling after the test.
variations: Add: "Turns out life's exam doesn't come with an answer key — just vibes."

items.sourceNote: Dcard 學測 考完那一刻 register — 比放榜還像放榜

zh-tw.content:
考完最後一科走出考場那一刻，
比放榜還像放榜。
至於上不上榜，那是下一個我要煩惱的事。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考最後一科出來那種「終於是個人」的瞬間，配張陽光照超有畫面。
variations: 也能寫成：「走出考場 = 出獄；放榜 = 判刑。中間那段叫做暫時自由。」

en.content:
Walking out of the last exam feels more like results day than results day itself.
Whether I passed is a problem for future me.
en.editorNote: Post this with a photo of the empty exam hall behind you — the universal end-of-finals mood.
variations: Try: "Leaving the exam = parole. Results day = sentencing. Everything in between is borrowed freedom."

items.sourceNote: 國中會考 5/16-17 register — 銜接班 frame

zh-tw.content:
會考完那天我以為自由了。
後來才發現，自由的後面還有：
暑期銜接班、新生先修班、英文加強班、數學重點班。
原來會考只是大門，後面還有一整排門。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合國中會考完的孩子貼在限動，爸媽看了會心虛地默默關掉視窗。
variations: 可以縮短成：「會考結束 ≠ 暑假開始，只是換了一個教室。」

en.content:
After the big exam I thought I was free.
Then came summer prep, pre-orientation prep, English boot camp, and math review camp.
The exam wasn't a door. It was the first of many doors.
en.editorNote: For middle schoolers who just learned that summer is also a curriculum.
variations: Shorter: "Exam over ≠ summer starts. Just a different classroom."

items.sourceNote: 考試範圍對照 register — 背的 vs 考的 frame

zh-tw.content:
我背的範圍跟考的範圍，像兩個會考。
它們可能曾經認識過，但是從來沒見過面。
zh-tw.editorNote: 看到考卷瞬間想哭時的內心 OS，傳給同學笑著哭一波。
variations: 進階：「老師說考試範圍是這幾課，命題老師說：『沒寫死，那就都算。』」

en.content:
What I studied and what showed up on the test feel like two different exams.
They may have heard about each other once. They have never met.
en.editorNote: The face-down moment of every test ever — share it after, not before.
variations: Add: "Teacher said the scope was chapters 1–5. Test setter said 'unspecified means everything.'"

items.sourceNote: 考前夜 register — 早點睡 vs 滑手機 對照

zh-tw.content:
考試前一晚，我媽說：「早點睡。」
我說：「好。」
然後我滑了四個小時的手機。
睡前的我和起床的我，是兩個從未合作的陌生人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考前一夜共鳴感 100％，配一張凌晨三點的天花板就完美了。
variations: 可以加：「醒來那一刻，我恨他比恨考試還多。」

en.content:
Night before the exam, mom said: "Sleep early."
I said: "Sure."
Then scrolled my phone for four hours.
Night-me and morning-me are two strangers who refuse to cooperate.
en.editorNote: The universal ceiling-staring confession — pair it with a 3am photo for full effect.
variations: Add: "Morning me hates night me more than the exam itself."

items.sourceNote: 國文考懷疑人生 register — funtexthub 廢文化主場

zh-tw.content:
明明考的是國文，
為什麼考完之後，我懷疑的不是答案，是我自己的人生。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考完國文那種「我到底有沒有讀過書」的精神損傷感，傳給班群效果最佳。
variations: 也能改：「考的是國文，崩潰的是國語、英文、人生這三題我都不會。」

en.content:
It was a Chinese exam.
But after walking out, the thing I doubt isn't my answers — it's my entire life.
en.editorNote: For the post-language-test existential crisis. Drop it in the group chat with no follow-up.
variations: Try: "Came in to take a language test. Left questioning my fluency in being alive."

items.sourceNote: Software update 比喻 — 國際英文流行 frame

zh-tw.content:
考試就像軟體更新。
不方便、突然出現、無法跳過，
而且每次更新完都覺得自己變更慢。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合理工腦或工程師朋友群組，懂科技梗的會多按一個讚。
variations: 延伸：「重考 = 重灌；模擬考 = 內測；正式考 = 上線。」

en.content:
Exams are like software updates.
Inconvenient, sudden, impossible to skip,
and somehow you feel slower every time it finishes.
en.editorNote: Tech-brain humor — perfect for engineer friends or anyone who's clicked 'remind me later' too many times.
variations: Add: "Resit = reinstall. Mock = beta. Real exam = production."

items.sourceNote: 臨時抱佛腳 register — 廢文文學版

zh-tw.content:
我不是不讀書，
我只是把整個學期的進度，
壓縮在考前那一個晚上的咖啡裡。
zh-tw.editorNote: 可以拿來幫熬夜的自己平反，配一杯第三杯黑咖啡的照片正好。
variations: 再加：「咖啡是液體的進度條，喝越多代表離崩潰越近。」

en.content:
I'm not avoiding studying.
I'm just compressing one whole semester
into a single cup of coffee the night before.
en.editorNote: Pair with a photo of your third coffee — universal cram-night content.
variations: Add: "Coffee is a liquid progress bar. Each refill = one step closer to collapse."

items.sourceNote: 考場心境 五階段 register — 對照式廢文

zh-tw.content:
進考場前：我會。
看到題目：我有看過。
寫一半：我以為我會。
寫完：我會什麼？
出考場：我是誰，我在哪。
zh-tw.editorNote: 五階段心境對照，傳到班群一秒引發共鳴接龍。
variations: 可加：「對答案：我下輩子再會。」

en.content:
Before the exam: I know this.
Reading the question: I've seen this.
Mid-answer: I thought I knew this.
Finished: What did I know?
Leaving the hall: Who am I and where is this.
en.editorNote: The five stages of exam grief — drop in the group chat for instant chaos.
variations: Add: "Checking the answer key: see you in the next life."

items.sourceNote: 作文寫不完 register — 學測常見梗

zh-tw.content:
作文題目給的時間是五十分鐘。
我前四十分鐘在想開頭。
後十分鐘把人生濃縮成三段。
結論：我的人生大概也是這樣寫出來的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 寫作文的痛大家都懂，這句配上凌亂的考卷照超有共感。
variations: 也能說：「作文最後一段叫做『綜上所述』，意思是『時間到了我亂寫』。」

en.content:
We had fifty minutes for the essay.
I spent forty thinking of an opening line.
I compressed my entire worldview into the last ten.
Maybe that's how I built my actual life too.
en.editorNote: Essay panic = life panic. Universal feeling, very postable.
variations: Add: "My conclusion paragraph is just 'in summary' — translation: I ran out of time."

items.sourceNote: 對答案後悔 register — 不對答案 自我保護 frame

zh-tw.content:
考完最重要的事不是檢討，是別對答案。
保留那段「我以為我考得不錯」的時光，
是考試送給每個考生最後的溫柔。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考完想衝去對答案的朋友傳這句，救他一晚的心情。
variations: 再加：「成績單會自己來找你，不用主動上前迎接。」

en.content:
After the exam, the most important thing isn't reviewing — it's not checking the answers.
The "I think I did okay" hour
is the last bit of mercy the exam ever gives you.
en.editorNote: For the friend who wants to compare answers the second they leave the hall — save them one peaceful evening.
variations: Add: "The results will find you. You don't need to walk toward them."

items.sourceNote: 拖延證書化 register — 黑帶 procrastination 梗在地化

zh-tw.content:
別人拿的是書卷獎，
我拿的是拖延界的終身成就獎。
而且這個獎我從國小就開始累積點數了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合自我介紹寫不出長處時拿來救場，配個歪嘴笑的自拍剛剛好。
variations: 也可以說：「我不是不努力，我是把努力延後到最後一刻才一次用完。」
進階版：「拖延是我唯一不會拖延的事。」

en.content:
Other people collect honor roll certificates.
I'm collecting points toward a lifetime achievement award in procrastination.
I've been building this résumé since elementary school.
en.editorNote: Drop this when someone asks about your strengths and you've got nothing — half-smile selfie pairs well.
variations: Try: "I'm not lazy. I'm just saving all my effort for the last possible second."
Heavier: "Procrastinating is the only thing I never procrastinate on."

items.sourceNote: 會考 5/16-17 倒數 register — 父母 vs 考生 視角差 frame

zh-tw.content:
媽媽問：「你緊張嗎？」
我說：「還好。」
其實我已經把每一科可能考砸的劇本，
在腦袋裡重播了三百遍。
所以我不是不緊張，我是已經緊張到習慣了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 會考前一週的限動神句，發出去媽媽會看到，但她假裝沒看到。
variations: 也可以縮短：「我說『還好』的意思是『我已經崩潰過很多次了』。」

en.content:
Mom asked: "Are you nervous?"
I said: "Not really."
Meanwhile I've replayed every possible disaster scenario
three hundred times in my head.
I'm not un-nervous. I'm just used to being nervous.
en.editorNote: Story-post material for the week before finals — your mom will see it and pretend she didn't.
variations: Shorter: "'Not really' is just code for 'I've already had ten breakdowns about it.'"

items.sourceNote: 考前許願 register — 拜拜 vs 讀書 對照

zh-tw.content:
考前一週，我去文昌廟拜了三次。
讀書時間總共三小時。
所以我準備考試的策略是：
把希望外包，把焦慮自留。
zh-tw.editorNote: 拜文昌的考生都懂，配個廟裡蔥跟芹菜的照片更應景。
variations: 可以加：「我求的不是高分，是命題老師今天心情好。」
也能改：「神明保佑沒讀書的人，是這個世界最後的浪漫。」

en.content:
The week before the exam I visited the temple three times.
Total study hours: three.
My exam prep strategy is basically:
outsource the hope, keep the anxiety.
en.editorNote: Universal pre-exam superstition humor — works for any culture's version of lucky charms.
variations: Add: "I'm not praying for a high score. I'm praying the test setter is in a good mood."
Try: "The gods protecting students who didn't study is the last romance left in this world."

items.sourceNote: 考生 vs 同學 群組 register — 假裝沒讀 frame

zh-tw.content:
班群裡每個人都說：「我都沒讀。」
結果考完每個人的分數都比我高。
原來「沒讀」是同學之間的暗號，
意思是「我讀超多但不想讓你以為我很拼」。
zh-tw.editorNote: 全台灣班群共同的潛規則，傳出去保證有同學跳出來說「不是啦我真的沒讀」。
variations: 進階：「下次有人說沒讀，我會直接回他：『沒讀的話請你連同情都不要給我。』」

en.content:
Everyone in the group chat said: "I didn't study at all."
Then they all scored higher than me.
Turns out "didn't study" is a secret classmate code for
"studied way too much but didn't want to look try-hard."
en.editorNote: Universal group-chat law of physics — post and watch a classmate jump in to insist they really didn't study.
variations: Add: "Next time someone says they didn't study, I'm telling them to keep their pity too."

items.sourceNote: AI 世代讀書 register — ChatGPT 幫不了考場 frame

zh-tw.content:
整個學期都是 AI 幫我寫作業。
進考場的那一刻才發現，
它不能進來，它的記憶卡也帶不進來。
我和它的合作，到此正式告吹。
zh-tw.editorNote: 2026 AI 世代考生的內心 OS，配個沒收手機通知圖正中紅心。
variations: 可以加：「平常 AI 幫我，今天我幫 AI 求個分數。」
另一版：「我和 ChatGPT 的友情，止步於考場大門。」

en.content:
All semester my AI did the homework.
Then I walked into the exam hall and realized —
it can't come in, and neither can its memory.
Our partnership officially ends at the door.
en.editorNote: Peak 2026 student energy — pair with a screenshot of the phone-collection notice.
variations: Add: "All year the AI carried me. Today I'm the one praying for it."
Try: "My friendship with ChatGPT ends at the exam hall door."

items.sourceNote: 115 會考 5/16-17 倒數五天 register — 時間錯覺 frame

zh-tw.content:
倒數五天的時候我覺得還有五天。
倒數三天的時候我覺得還有三天。
倒數一天的時候我覺得：
「咦，那五天三天那幾天我到底做了什麼？」
zh-tw.editorNote: 115 會考前一週的標準內心戲，發出來同學會集體沉默點愛心。
variations: 可以縮短：「倒數歸倒數，我的進度是倒著數的。」
也能寫成：「時間沒有變少，是我把它丟到別的地方去了。」

en.content:
Five days out I thought I had five days.
Three days out I thought I had three.
One day out I thought:
"Wait, what did I actually do on those five and three days?"
en.editorNote: Universal countdown-week brain — post it and watch classmates quietly heart it.
variations: Shorter: "The countdown went down. My progress went sideways."
Add: "Time didn't disappear. I just left it somewhere else."

items.sourceNote: 考前讀書計畫 register — 計畫 vs 實際 對照

zh-tw.content:
我做了一個完美的讀書計畫。
計畫上：每天三小時，分科進度滿滿。
實際上：第一天讀計畫表，第二天修計畫表，第三天哀悼計畫表。
計畫表本身就是我最熟的科目。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考生們做完計畫表就以為自己讀完書了，這句一發班群秒被截圖。
variations: 進階：「我背得最熟的不是課文，是我自己訂的進度表。」

en.content:
I made the perfect study plan.
On paper: three hours a day, every subject covered.
In reality: day one I read the plan, day two I edited the plan, day three I held a funeral for the plan.
The study plan is the subject I know best.
en.editorNote: Post-mortem for every study schedule ever — instant relate for the planner-aesthetic crowd.
variations: Add: "The thing I memorized best wasn't a textbook. It was my own schedule."

items.sourceNote: 考完放空 register — 大腦關機 frame

zh-tw.content:
考完那天我躺在床上發呆三小時。
不是在休息，是大腦真的關機了。
它說：「我已經把一整年的能量在剛剛那兩小時花光，請等下次補貨。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 考完那種「人還在但靈魂去山上閉關」的狀態，配張天花板照超神還原。
variations: 也能說：「考完不是放假，是我在自動重灌系統。」

en.content:
After the exam I stared at the ceiling for three hours.
Not resting — my brain literally shut down.
It said: "I spent a year's worth of energy in those two hours. Please wait for restock."
en.editorNote: The post-exam vegetative state we all know — caption a ceiling pic and you're set.
variations: Add: "It's not a break. My system is reinstalling itself."

items.sourceNote: 成績單 vs 自我認知 register — 真實落差 frame

zh-tw.content:
我以為的我：認真讀書、規律生活、預計穩穩過。
成績單裡的我：好像跟那個我完全不認識。
看來我認識的那個我，從來沒去過考場。
zh-tw.editorNote: 放榜當天的高共鳴句，配張看到成績單瞬間表情的迷因剛剛好。
variations: 再加：「我跟成績單上的那個人，今天才正式見面。」
也能說：「我以為的我，住在我的計畫表裡，不在考場。」

en.content:
Me in my head: studied hard, balanced life, easy pass.
Me on the score report: a complete stranger.
Apparently the me I knew never actually showed up to the exam.
en.editorNote: Results-day mood — pair with a side-eye meme for full effect.
variations: Add: "Me and the person on this score report finally meet today."
Try: "The me I imagined lives in my planner, not the exam hall."

items.sourceNote: 考試象形文字 register — 看不懂題目 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
翻開考卷的那一刻，
我以為自己誤拿到了甲骨文期中考。
每個字我都認識，組合起來像是來自另一個朝代的密語。
zh-tw.editorNote: 拿到考卷瞬間的眼神死，配張一臉茫然的考生迷因效果最強。
variations: 可以換成：「題目我都看得懂，意思我都看不懂。」
進階：「這張考卷不是中文，是中文的鄉音版。」

en.content:
The moment I opened the paper,
I thought I'd picked up a hieroglyphics midterm by mistake.
I knew every word — together they read like a code from another dynasty.
en.editorNote: Universal 'what is this question even asking' face — pair with a confused-blink meme.
variations: Try: "I understand each word. I don't understand the sentence."
Add: "This isn't a test. It's a treasure map without the X."

items.sourceNote: 115 會考 5/16-17 倒數三天 register — 松鼠埋核桃 比喻在地化

zh-tw.content:
考前複習，像松鼠在找牠去年埋的核桃。
我知道我讀過，
我也知道它就在腦袋裡某個角落，
可是它在哪、長什麼樣子、我完全沒印象。
zh-tw.editorNote: 115 會考前三天的內心戲，配張翻書翻到爛的桌面照超寫實。
variations: 可以加：「最後我選擇相信考場的氣氛會幫我把它挖出來。」
也能寫成：「我背過，只是它跟我玩躲貓貓。」

en.content:
Cramming before an exam is like being a squirrel hunting for nuts it buried last winter.
I know I studied it.
I know it's somewhere in my brain.
I have no idea where, what shape, or whether it's still alive.
en.editorNote: Peak countdown-week mood — works for any finals, any country, any species.
variations: Add: "I'm trusting the vibes in the exam hall to dig it up for me."
Try: "I memorized it. It's just playing hide and seek."

items.sourceNote: 考試恐懼動力學 register — 純恐懼驅動 frame

zh-tw.content:
我的讀書動力來源不是夢想，
是「再不讀就完蛋了」的純粹恐懼。
所以我不是在進步，我是在逃命。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合考前一晚邊抖邊讀書的限動文案，留言區會出現「我也是」的接龍。
variations: 也能說：「夢想推不動我，恐懼可以。所以我每天都在被恐懼追著跑。」
進階：「努力 = 害怕的具象化。」

en.content:
My motivation isn't dreams or goals.
It's pure fear of what happens if I don't open this book.
So I'm not making progress — I'm running for my life.
en.editorNote: The honest version of every motivational poster — drop it the night before a final.
variations: Add: "Dreams can't move me. Fear can. So I spend my days outrunning fear."
Try: "Effort is just fear with better posture."

items.sourceNote: 考試 = 期末關卡 register — 遊戲化比喻 frame

zh-tw.content:
考試就像遊戲的最終魔王戰。
差別是：遊戲打輸可以讀檔，
考試打輸要等下一年改版重練。
而且裝備不能繼承，技能要重點，連角色都會老一歲。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合愛打電動的考生群組，傳出去同學會回「我已經 NG 兩次了」。
variations: 可以加：「補習班是付費攻略本，老師是 NPC，命題老師是隱藏 boss。」
也能寫成：「考試的存檔點只有一個，就是放榜那天。」

en.content:
Exams are basically the final boss fight.
Difference: in a game you can reload your save.
If you lose the exam, you wait a whole year for the next patch, your gear doesn't carry over, your skill tree resets, and your character ages one year.
Worst respawn system ever designed.
en.editorNote: Gamer-brain humor — perfect for the group chat where everyone speed-runs studying.
variations: Add: "Cram school is the paid strategy guide. Teachers are NPCs. The test setter is the hidden boss."
Try: "The only save point is results day."

items.sourceNote: 考試壓力 vs 卡路里 register — 燃燒比喻在地化 frame

zh-tw.content:
如果壓力會燃燒卡路里，
那我考前一週應該已經瘦成模特兒了。
結果只瘦了髮量、睡眠跟學費。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考前焦慮但體重沒掉的學生 OS，發限動配個鏡子前抓頭髮的自拍剛剛好。
variations: 可以縮短：「壓力沒讓我瘦下來，只讓我變得更不像人。」
進階版：「考前掉的不是體重，是頭髮、自尊跟對教育的信任。」

en.content:
If stress burned calories,
the week before finals would have me catwalk-ready.
Instead I only lost my hair, my sleep, and my tuition.
en.editorNote: For the exam-week spiral where everything but your weight disappears — mirror-selfie energy.
variations: Shorter: "Stress didn't slim me down. It just made me less recognizable."
Add: "Pre-exam I lose hair, dignity, and my faith in the school system. Never weight."

items.sourceNote: 115 會考 5/16-17 倒數兩天 register — 信仰崩塌 frame

zh-tw.content:
倒數兩天的時候，
我開始相信平行宇宙。
因為一定有一個版本的我，
從寒假開始就乖乖讀書，
而那個我，絕對不是我。
zh-tw.editorNote: 115 會考前兩天的內心戲，配個翻爛的講義照超有畫面感。
variations: 可以加：「另一個宇宙的我已經模擬考三次了，這個宇宙的我才打開第一章。」
也能改：「我相信平行宇宙，因為這個宇宙的我顯然壞掉了。」

en.content:
Two days out,
I started believing in the multiverse.
There has to be a version of me
who actually studied since winter break.
That me is definitely not this me.
en.editorNote: Last-stretch crisis content — pair with a photo of an unopened textbook for full effect.
variations: Add: "Other-universe me has done three mock exams. This-universe me just opened chapter one."
Try: "I believe in the multiverse because this universe's me is clearly defective."

items.sourceNote: 考試 vs 信任 wordplay register — tested without trusted frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
考試是這世上少數的場合：
你被測驗，但沒人相信你。
監考老師繞著你走，攝影機盯著你看，
連你的水壺都要先被檢查過。
難怪我們對成績有陰影，從入場那一刻就開始了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考完想抱怨制度時拿這句出來最體面，配張考場警示牌的照片更有畫面。
variations: 可以縮短：「考試 = 被檢驗但不被信任的兩小時。」
進階：「不准帶筆袋、不准帶手錶、不准帶腦袋以外的東西。問題是我連腦袋都不太敢帶。」

en.content:
Exams are one of the few places where
you get tested without being trusted.
The proctor circles you, the camera watches you,
even your water bottle gets searched.
No wonder we're scarred by grades — the trauma starts at the door.
en.editorNote: The graceful way to complain about the system — share after the exam, not before.
variations: Shorter: "Exams = two hours of being inspected and distrusted at the same time."
Add: "No pencil case. No watch. No anything but your brain. And honestly I wasn't sure I should bring that either."

items.sourceNote: 考試 = 希望測驗 register — test hope frame 在地化廢文

zh-tw.content:
期末考考的不是知識，
是你還剩下多少希望。
我打開考卷的那一刻，
發現我的希望，跟我背的範圍一樣，已經提前畢業。
zh-tw.editorNote: 期末考完那種「我已經放棄治療」的氛圍，配個雙手攤平的迷因正中紅心。
variations: 可以加：「我交卷不是因為寫完，是因為我跟希望同時離場。」
也能改：「期末考測驗你還相不相信自己。我的答案是：沒有了。」

en.content:
Final exams don't test knowledge.
They test how much hope you've got left.
The second I opened the paper,
my hope, like the chapters I studied, had already graduated early.
en.editorNote: Peak finals-week surrender energy — caption a shrug meme and ship it.
variations: Add: "I didn't hand in the paper because I finished. I handed it in because my hope clocked out."
Try: "Finals test whether you still believe in yourself. Mine submitted a blank."

items.sourceNote: 115 會考 5/16 前一天 register — 接受命運 frame

zh-tw.content:
倒數一天的時候我終於不焦慮了。
不是因為我準備好了，
是因為現在再焦慮也來不及了。
原來內心的平靜，
是恐慌跑完一輪之後的副產品。
zh-tw.editorNote: 115 會考前一晚的精神狀態，配個攤在床上看天花板的限動超應景。
variations: 可以加：「這不叫穩，這叫已經沒有力氣再慌了。」
也能改：「我不是不怕，我是恐懼用完了。」

en.content:
One day out, I finally stopped panicking.
Not because I'm ready,
but because panicking now wouldn't change anything.
Turns out inner peace
is just what's left after fear runs out of gas.
en.editorNote: The night-before-finals zen — caption a ceiling-stare photo for the full effect.
variations: Add: "This isn't calm. This is fear running on empty."
Try: "I'm not unafraid. I just used up all my fear earlier this week."

items.sourceNote: 會考前一晚 文具准考證 焦慮 register — 重複檢查 frame

zh-tw.content:
考前一晚我檢查准考證五次。
第六次的時候它已經會自己說：「我還在。」
我準備的不是考試，
是隨時要證明我有資格出現在考場。
zh-tw.editorNote: 會考前一晚翻包包翻到家人崩潰的考生 OS，配張桌上一排 2B 鉛筆的照片正中紅心。
variations: 可以加：「我背題目沒這麼勤，但檢查文具我可以拿冠軍。」
進階：「2B 鉛筆五支、橡皮擦兩個、准考證一張、信心零份。」

en.content:
Night before the exam, I checked my admission ticket five times.
By the sixth check it just said: "I'm still here."
I'm not preparing for the exam.
I'm preparing to prove I'm allowed to show up.
en.editorNote: For anyone who's repacked their bag four times before bed — pair with a photo of pencils lined up like soldiers.
variations: Add: "I never reviewed material this hard. Checking pencils, on the other hand — gold medal."
Try: "Five 2B pencils, two erasers, one admission ticket, zero confidence."

items.sourceNote: Dear finals 分手信 register — break up letter 在地化

zh-tw.content:
親愛的期末考：
我們認識太久了，久到我已經忘記沒有你的日子長什麼樣。
但我還是必須說：
不是我的問題，是你的問題。
而且這次分手是永久的，請不要再回來找我，謝謝。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考完最後一科的告別文，貼在 IG 限動配張收書桌的照片完美收尾。
variations: 可以縮短：「期末考，這次分手請不要再傳模擬考來試探我。」
也能改：「我們不適合，請去找下一屆。」

en.content:
Dear finals,
We've known each other too long. So long I forgot what life looked like before you.
But I have to say it:
It's not me, it's you.
And this time the breakup is permanent. Please don't show up again. Thanks.
en.editorNote: The official goodbye after the last paper — pair with a desk-cleared photo.
variations: Shorter: "Finals, please don't slide into my DMs as a mock exam ever again."
Try: "We're not a match. Please find the next batch of students."

items.sourceNote: 考試當天早晨 早餐 register — 一口都吃不下 frame

zh-tw.content:
考試當天早上，
媽媽煎了我最愛的蛋餅。
我看著它，它看著我，
我們都知道：今天它不會被吃完。
緊張是一種會讓人類失去飢餓功能的奇怪設定。
zh-tw.editorNote: 會考當天早晨那種「胃跟腦袋一起罷工」的限動文案，配張動沒幾口的早餐照超有畫面。
variations: 可以加：「我跟早餐都很努力了，是身體先放棄。」
也能改：「今天的我，連蛋餅都顯得太重。」

en.content:
Morning of the exam,
mom made my favorite breakfast.
I looked at it, it looked at me,
and we both knew: today it wasn't getting finished.
Nerves are a weird system feature that disables human hunger.
en.editorNote: For the exam-morning stomach strike — pair with a half-eaten breakfast pic.
variations: Add: "Both me and the breakfast tried our best. The body tapped out first."
Try: "Today, even pancakes feel too heavy."

items.sourceNote: 115 會考 5/17 自然科 浮力魔王題 register — 圖表題占一半 frame

zh-tw.content:
自然考完，朋友問我：「浮力那題你怎麼寫？」
我說：「我浮著寫的。」
沒有依據，只有信念。
反正物體會不會沉，跟我會不會沉，今天好像是同一題。
zh-tw.editorNote: 115 會考第二天自然科考完那題浮力魔王題後的內心戲，傳到班群會引起整排同學留言「+1」。
variations: 可以加：「圖表題占一半，意思是另一半我也看不懂。」
也能改：「自然考的是浮力，我考的是浮在水面上不要沉下去的求生本能。」

en.content:
Friend asked after the science exam: "How did you answer the buoyancy question?"
I said: "I floated through it."
No evidence, just faith.
Whether the object sinks and whether I sink turned out to be the same question today.
en.editorNote: For the post-physics-question survivor mode — instant share to the group chat for chorus replies.
variations: Add: "Half the test was charts and graphs. The other half I also couldn't read."
Try: "The exam tested buoyancy. I was testing my ability to stay above water."

items.sourceNote: 115 會考 5/17 英文閱讀 冰島語言存亡 register — 長文閱讀 frame

zh-tw.content:
英文閱讀測驗在講冰島語言的存亡。
我看完之後最擔心的不是冰島語，
是我中文的存亡。
因為這篇我從頭到尾沒看懂任何一句。
zh-tw.editorNote: 115 會考第二天英文長閱讀崩潰後的限動標配，配張托腮看天花板的照片更傳神。
variations: 可以加：「冰島離我太遠，這個題組離我更遠。」
也能改：「我擔心的不是世界上有幾種語言會消失，是我中文還能撐多久。」

en.content:
The reading section was about the survival of the Icelandic language.
By the end, I wasn't worried about Icelandic.
I was worried about my own native language.
Because I didn't understand a single sentence in that passage.
en.editorNote: For the post-reading-passage spiral — drop after any test with a brutal long-form question.
variations: Add: "Iceland is far from me. This passage is farther."
Try: "Forget endangered languages worldwide. My grasp of my own is the real crisis."

items.sourceNote: 115 會考 5/17 最後一科考完 register — 走出考場 解放 frame

zh-tw.content:
英聽結束的鐘聲響起的那一刻，
我聽到的不是答案，
是兩年國中生活在我腦袋裡關門的聲音。
外面陽光好像比進考場前還大。
世界沒變，是我換了一個版本。
zh-tw.editorNote: 115 會考考完最後一科那一刻的解放感，配張走出校門逆光的照片完美收尾。
variations: 可以加：「我不是聽完英聽，我是聽完了一個階段。」
也能改：「會考結束的鐘聲是我這兩年聽過最好聽的英文。」

en.content:
The moment the bell rang at the end of the listening test,
what I heard wasn't an answer.
It was the sound of two years of middle school closing in my head.
The sun outside felt brighter than when I walked in.
The world didn't change. I just shipped a new version of me.
en.editorNote: For the walk-out-of-the-last-paper moment — pair with a backlit shot of the school gate.
variations: Add: "I didn't just finish a listening test. I finished a chapter."
Try: "The end-of-exam bell was the best English I've heard in two years."

items.sourceNote: 115 會考 5/17 考完當晚 不知道要幹嘛 register — 空虛 frame

zh-tw.content:
會考考完當晚，我打開手機，
發現自己不知道要做什麼。
讀書讀了兩年，
從沒想過放下書之後的我，
是一個沒有任務的人。
原來自由不是禮物，是一張空白的待辦清單。
zh-tw.editorNote: 115 會考完當晚那種「自由到不知道怎麼用」的氛圍，發在限動會有同學跳出來說「我也是」。
variations: 可以加：「我準備好考試了，沒準備好考完之後的人生。」
也能改：「自由的第一個小時，我滑手機滑到不知道在滑什麼。」

en.content:
Night after the last exam, I picked up my phone
and realized I had no idea what to do.
I studied for two years,
but never imagined who I'd be once the books closed.
Turns out freedom isn't a gift — it's a blank to-do list.
en.editorNote: For the eerie post-finals evening when freedom feels like an empty room — story-post energy.
variations: Add: "I prepped for the exam. Nobody prepped me for life after it."
Try: "First hour of freedom: scrolling my phone without knowing what I was scrolling for."

items.sourceNote: 考試策略 panic-cry-pass register — 三段式 cope 在地化

zh-tw.content:
我的讀書計畫分三階段：
第一階段：先慌。
第二階段：再哭。
第三階段：考完莫名其妙還是過了。
這套方法我已經用了三年，不能說有效，但很穩定。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考前一週貼班群，立刻引發一排「+1 同款套餐」留言。
variations: 可以縮短：「我不是讀書，是在崩潰跟僥倖之間反覆橫跳。」
進階：「這個方法叫做：把奇蹟當成標準作業流程。」

en.content:
My study plan has three phases:
Phase one: panic.
Phase two: cry.
Phase three: somehow pass anyway.
I've used this method for three years. I won't say it works, but it's consistent.
en.editorNote: Drop this in the group chat exam week — the +1 replies will arrive in under a minute.
variations: Shorter: "I don't study. I just oscillate between breakdowns and lucky breaks."
Add: "This is called turning miracles into standard operating procedure."

items.sourceNote: Douglas Adams deadline whoosh register — 截止日 詩意 在地化

zh-tw.content:
我喜歡截止日。
喜歡它從我身邊呼嘯而過時，那種帶有風的聲音。
喜歡它頭也不回，從不停留，
讓我每次都以為自己還有時間。
我們的關係很穩定：它一直跑，我一直追，從來沒追上過。
zh-tw.editorNote: 改寫 Douglas Adams 名句的廢文版，適合報告/作業/考試三合一場景的限動。
variations: 可以縮短：「我跟截止日的關係：它跑得快，我追得慢，距離永遠剛剛好。」
進階：「截止日經過我身邊那一聲咻，是我聽過最殘忍的浪漫。」

en.content:
I love deadlines.
I love the whooshing sound they make as they fly past.
They never turn around, never slow down,
so I always think I still have time.
It's a stable relationship: they run, I chase, and I never catch up.
en.editorNote: A long-form remix of the Douglas Adams classic — works for any essay, exam, or project crunch.
variations: Shorter: "My deadline and I have a rhythm: it runs, I jog, the gap stays perfect."
Add: "The whoosh of a deadline passing is the cruelest love song I know."

items.sourceNote: 115 會考 5/18 考後一天 解放感 register — 醒來不用讀書 frame

zh-tw.content:
今天早上醒來那一瞬間，
我心裡咯噔一下：「糟了，今天還要讀書！」
三秒後才想起來：
會考已經結束了。
那三秒的心跳，是兩年國中生活在我身體裡的最後一次餘震。
zh-tw.editorNote: 115 會考結束隔天的限動神句，配張賴床的天花板照剛好捕捉那個瞬間。
variations: 可以加：「身體還在備考模式，是大腦比我先放暑假。」
也能改：「會考結束的證據不是成績，是我終於敢睡到自然醒。」

en.content:
Woke up this morning and my heart skipped:
"Oh no, I have to study today."
Three seconds later I remembered:
the big exam is already over.
Those three seconds of panic were the final aftershock of two years of middle school living inside my body.
en.editorNote: For the morning-after-the-last-exam moment — pair with a sleep-in ceiling shot.
variations: Add: "My body is still in study mode. My brain clocked out for summer earlier."
Try: "Proof the exam is over isn't the score — it's that I finally dared to sleep in."

items.sourceNote: AI 同學 vs 我 register — ChatGPT 一秒交報告 frame 2026 升級

zh-tw.content:
別人交報告：丟給 AI，三秒搞定。
我交報告：丟給 AI，AI 反問我「你想表達什麼？」
我才發現，原來連 AI 都需要我先想清楚。
而我整個學期，最沒做的事就是這件。
zh-tw.editorNote: 2026 學生把責任外包給 AI 卻外包失敗的時代金句，貼出去同學一秒共鳴。
variations: 可以加：「AI 不是萬能，它只是比我快放棄期待我。」
進階：「我以為 AI 是救生圈，沒想到它是面鏡子。」

en.content:
Other people submit reports: ask AI, done in three seconds.
I submit a report: ask AI, and AI asks me back, "What are you actually trying to say?"
That's when I realized even AI needs me to think first.
And thinking is the one thing I've avoided all semester.
en.editorNote: Peak 2026 student energy — outsourcing to AI only works if you've done the part AI can't.
variations: Add: "AI isn't all-powerful. It's just faster at giving up on me than I am."
Try: "I thought AI was a life raft. Turns out it's a mirror."

items.sourceNote: 115 會考 考完兩天 等成績 register — 6/5 放榜 倒數 frame

zh-tw.content:
會考結束兩天了。
離放榜還有半個多月。
這段時間沒有任務、沒有複習、沒有任何能做的事，
只剩下「等」這個動詞，把我磨成一個有耐心的人。
原來放榜前的日子，比考試本身還能訓練心理素質。
zh-tw.editorNote: 115 會考結束後等 6/5 放榜的高共鳴句，配張月曆圈著 6/5 的照片很到位。
variations: 可以加：「考試考的是知識，等放榜考的是 EQ。」
也能改：「會考最難的科目其實叫『等』，而且這科沒有複習講義。」

en.content:
Two days since the big exam ended.
Results are still over two weeks away.
No tasks, no review, nothing left to do —
just the verb "wait," slowly turning me into a patient person.
The waiting period trains your mental game harder than the exam ever did.
en.editorNote: For the limbo between final paper and results day — pair with a calendar shot with the date circled.
variations: Add: "The exam tested knowledge. Waiting for results tests emotional intelligence."
Try: "The hardest subject in finals is 'waiting,' and there's no study guide for it."

items.sourceNote: 考完隔天 突然空虛 register — 不知道要做什麼 frame 升級

zh-tw.content:
考完第二天，朋友揪我出去玩。
我說好，結果在捷運上想了三站：
「我可以玩了嗎？真的可以嗎？」
罪惡感比考試本身還黏，
它讀完整個國中跟我一起準備上高中。
zh-tw.editorNote: 115 會考結束後第一次出門那種「玩得心虛」的限動神句，配個捷運窗外的照片正剛好。
variations: 可以加：「我玩得不像在玩，比較像保釋出來放風。」
進階：「罪惡感是我國中三年最忠實的同學，連畢業都不肯離開。」

en.content:
Day two after the exam, friends asked me out.
I said yes, then spent three subway stops asking myself:
"Am I allowed to have fun? Like, really allowed?"
Guilt is stickier than the exam itself —
it studied with me all three years and is now applying to high school too.
en.editorNote: For the first post-exam hangout where your brain hasn't gotten the memo yet — subway-window photo works.
variations: Add: "I'm not really hanging out. I'm on parole and trying not to look suspicious."
Try: "Guilt was my most loyal classmate for three years. It refuses to graduate."

items.sourceNote: 115 會考 考後 親戚問候 register — 你考得怎樣 frame

zh-tw.content:
考完隔天回阿嬤家，
第一個阿姨問：「考得怎樣？」
第二個舅舅問：「考得怎樣？」
第三個表姐問：「考得怎樣？」
我終於明白：
會考結束的真正意義，是親戚問候系統正式上線。
zh-tw.editorNote: 115 會考完回家被親戚連環問的標配句，傳到家族群會收到表妹的「+1」。
variations: 可以加：「我已經想好答案了：『就那樣。』可以用一整個夏天。」
進階：「會考的考卷只有兩天，親戚的考卷有一整個暑假。」

en.content:
First day back at grandma's after the exam.
Aunt one: "How did it go?"
Uncle two: "How did it go?"
Cousin three: "How did it go?"
That's when I realized:
the real meaning of finishing the exam is the family Q&A system going live.
en.editorNote: For the relative-interrogation phase that follows every big exam — drop in the family group chat for chorus replies.
variations: Add: "I've prepped one answer: 'It was okay.' It'll get me through the whole summer."
Try: "The exam lasted two days. The family questions last all summer."

items.sourceNote: 考後睡眠補償 register — 補不回來的睡眠 frame

zh-tw.content:
考完那晚我睡了十二個小時。
醒來覺得：欸，怎麼還是累？
後來才懂：
我熬夜熬掉的不是時間，是身體裡某種叫做「精神」的東西，
它不像手機可以快充，它要慢慢、慢慢、慢慢，才肯回來。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考完睡到下午還是覺得身體被掏空的真實感，配張賴床的棉被照剛好。
variations: 可以加：「我以為睡眠是貸款，沒想到它是定存，提前領的話會被扣本金。」
也能改：「補眠這件事，補得回時間，補不回那個年輕的自己。」

en.content:
Night after the exam I slept twelve hours.
Woke up and thought: wait, why am I still tired?
Then it hit me:
what all those late nights stole wasn't time — it was something inside me called "spirit,"
and unlike a phone, it doesn't fast-charge. It comes back slowly, slowly, slowly.
en.editorNote: For the post-exam recovery sleep that somehow doesn't recover anything — under-the-covers photo energy.
variations: Add: "I thought sleep was a loan. Turns out it's a fixed deposit — withdraw early and you lose principal."
Try: "You can catch up on hours. You can't catch up on the younger version of you that lost them."

items.sourceNote: 考前自嘲 register — 我有讀，只是不記得讀到哪去 frame

zh-tw.content:
我發誓我有讀，
只是書讀進去之後就走自己的路，
沒有跟我說它去哪裡。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考前一晚發限動的標配廢文，下面留言會出現一排「我也是」。
variations: 可以加：「書跟我的關係是同事，不是朋友——下班就各自回家。」
也能改成：「我讀過，但那段記憶設成私人帳號，我自己都看不到。」

en.content:
I swear I studied.
The knowledge just went off and lived its own life after,
and never texted me where it ended up.
en.editorNote: Classic night-before-the-exam Story caption — your group chat will reply with "calling me out" reacts.
variations: Try: "Me and my notes are coworkers, not friends. We clock out and never speak again."
Add: "I read it. The memory just set itself to private and locked me out."

items.sourceNote: 補習班 register — 補了三年 vs 三題對的 對照

zh-tw.content:
補了三年的數學，
考卷上只對了三題。
我懷疑我補的不是數學，
是補習班老闆的房貸。
zh-tw.editorNote: 補習班結業同學群秒傳的句型，下面通常有人補一句「+1」+ 哭臉。
variations: 進階版：「我繳的學費，後來變成老師的特斯拉、我的眼淚。」
也能換：「補習補了三年，唯一進步的是我等公車的耐心。」

en.content:
Three years of math tutoring.
Three questions right on the exam.
I'm starting to think I wasn't funding my education —
I was funding my tutor's mortgage.
en.editorNote: For the cram-school graduation chat — drop it and watch the +1s roll in.
variations: Heavier take: "My tuition turned into my tutor's Tesla and my own tears."
Try: "Three years of tutoring. The only thing that improved was my patience at bus stops."

items.sourceNote: 考試壓力 register — 壓力燃燒卡路里 frame（國際梗本土化）

zh-tw.content:
如果壓力可以燃燒卡路里，
我從模擬考開始就該是維密天使。
結果我胖了三公斤，
身體大概是把焦慮存起來、利息算給我。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考前壓力爆棚配宵夜照的最佳註解，傳到減肥群秒被釘選。
variations: 也可以：「焦慮不會瘦，但會讓我半夜很有食慾——這算嗎？」
進階：「我以為壓力是運動，後來發現它是宵夜的同義詞。」

en.content:
If stress burned calories,
I'd have been a runway model since the first mock exam.
Instead I gained three kilos —
turns out my body files anxiety in the savings account,
with interest.
en.editorNote: Caption it under a 2 a.m. instant-noodle pic — your diet group chat will pin it.
variations: Try: "Anxiety doesn't burn fat. It just gives me a midnight appetite. Does that count?"
Add: "I thought stress was cardio. Turns out it's just a synonym for late-night snacking."

items.sourceNote: AI 時代考生 register — ChatGPT 會但我不會 frame

zh-tw.content:
考卷上的這題，
ChatGPT 三秒就解出來，
而我盯著它三十分鐘，
只解出一個結論：
原來人類的命運，就是負責當那個看不懂的觀眾。
zh-tw.editorNote: AI 世代考生限定的崩潰句，配 ChatGPT 截圖更有畫面。
variations: 也能換：「AI 已經會了，我還在學怎麼問問題。」
進階：「考場不能帶手機，所以我這次只能用『人類版』的我去考——很抱歉。」

en.content:
ChatGPT solves this question in three seconds.
I stared at it for thirty minutes
and reached only one conclusion:
humanity's role now is to sit in the audience and not get the joke.
en.editorNote: Built for the AI-era exam meltdown — pair it with a screenshot of ChatGPT one-shotting your homework.
variations: Try: "AI already knows the answer. I'm still learning how to phrase the question."
Add: "No phones in the exam hall — so today you only get the human-build of me. Sorry."

items.sourceNote: 考試 register — 軟體更新比喻（國際梗中文化）

zh-tw.content:
考試很像系統更新：
你沒準備、它照樣來，
而且每次更新完，
我這台機器都變得更慢、更卡、更想關機。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考完想癱在床上的真實寫照，配張黑屏手機照特別有戲。
variations: 可以加：「我已經申請延後更新八次了，學校還是強制安裝。」
也能換：「人生 2026 大更新，內容：考試、考試、再考試。修補項目：無。」

en.content:
Exams are basically system updates:
you're never ready, they install anyway,
and every time it's done,
this little machine of mine runs slower, laggier, and more in need of a full shutdown.
en.editorNote: Caption energy: post-exam, face-down in bed, phone on black screen.
variations: Add: "I've hit 'remind me later' eight times. School force-installed it anyway."
Try: "Life 2026 major update — contents: exams, exams, more exams. Bug fixes: none."

items.sourceNote: Dcard 考試板 拖延型自嘲 register — 讀書與滑手機對照

zh-tw.content:
我打開課本三分鐘，
滑手機三小時，
再回頭看課本，
它已經不認識我了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考前一週的真實寫照，配張手機螢幕時間截圖更崩潰。
variations: 也能換：「課本：『你誰？』我：『沒事，我也忘了我是誰。』」
進階版：「我跟課本的關係，比我跟前任還疏遠。」

en.content:
Opened the textbook for three minutes.
Scrolled my phone for three hours.
Went back to the textbook.
It didn't recognize me anymore.
en.editorNote: Pair it with a screen-time screenshot that has a number you don't want your parents to see.
variations: Try: "Textbook: 'Who are you?' Me: 'Honestly, same question.'"
Add: "My textbook and I have less chemistry than me and my ex."

items.sourceNote: 學測梗圖 register — 念書方式與分數無關聯的反差

zh-tw.content:
我準備了三章。
考出來考五章。
剩下的兩章，
出題老師大概也是臨時想到的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 看到考卷瞬間嘴角下垂的那種梗，學測完發 Threads 必收一堆愛心。
variations: 也能說：「我背的剛好是不考的，不考的剛好我都背。」
進階版：「老師說範圍三章，考卷說範圍人生。」

en.content:
I studied three chapters.
The exam covered five.
The other two — 
I'm pretty sure the teacher made them up on the spot.
en.editorNote: Built for that 'flip the paper, mouth drops open' moment. Post-finals Threads gold.
variations: Try: "Everything I studied wasn't on it. Everything on it I didn't study. Perfect alignment."
Add: "Teacher said three chapters. The paper said: all of human existence."

items.sourceNote: PTT 高中板 考前焦慮 register — 睡眠與分數成反比的自嘲

zh-tw.content:
睡四小時：拿 A。
睡五小時：拿 B。
睡七小時：分數沒了，但夢裡我考一百。
結論：我選擇做夢。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合凌晨三點還在念書時 po 限動，朋友看了會傳一句『加油』然後繼續睡。
variations: 也能換：「我醒著的時候不會，睡著的時候會——可惜考試不接受夢境作答。」
進階版：「睡眠是補品，但補完還是不會寫。」

en.content:
Four hours of sleep: A.
Five hours: B.
Seven hours: no score, but in my dream I aced it.
Conclusion: I'm choosing the dream.
en.editorNote: Drop it at 3 a.m. mid-cramming. Friends will reply 'good luck' and go right back to bed.
variations: Try: "I know it in my sleep. Sadly the exam doesn't accept dream submissions."
Add: "Sleep is a power-up. Doesn't actually power up anything useful for the test."

items.sourceNote: Dcard 廢文板 考完心情 register — 對答案後悔的反差

zh-tw.content:
考前：「拜託考我會的。」
考中：「這題我會。」
考後對答案：「原來我會的不是我以為的那種會。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 考完離開試場那種空虛感的精準翻譯，發在限動會被同學瘋狂截圖。
variations: 也能換：「我以為的會 vs 老師認定的會，是兩個平行宇宙。」
進階版：「我自信滿滿走出考場，自信被答案本一頁打死。」

en.content:
Before the exam: "Please ask what I know."
During: "Oh, I know this one."
After, checking the answers: "Turns out my 'knowing' and actual knowing are unrelated."
en.editorNote: Captures the soul-leaving-the-body feeling after results drop. Story material for sure.
variations: Try: "What I think I know vs. what the answer key thinks I know — parallel universes."
Add: "Walked out confident. The answer key killed that confidence in one page."

items.sourceNote: Dcard 考試板 讀書計畫 vs 實際執行 register — 完美計畫表第一天就崩潰

zh-tw.content:
我做了一張超漂亮的讀書計畫表，
用三種顏色的螢光筆畫得像藝術品。
第一天的進度是：把計畫表貼在牆上。
達標。
第二天的進度是：欣賞昨天貼的計畫表。
也達標。
讀書計畫，我是一張都沒漏掉。
zh-tw.editorNote: 貼一張自己精心做的計畫表照片，下面配這段，準時收割「我也是」一排留言。
variations: 可以加：「我規劃讀書的時間，比讀書本身還多。」
也能換：「畫計畫表是我這學期唯一沒拖延的事。」

en.content:
I made a gorgeous study plan.
Three highlighter colors, looks like a museum piece.
Day one's task: tape the plan to the wall.
Done.
Day two's task: admire yesterday's plan.
Also done.
I haven't missed a single day of my study plan.
en.editorNote: Post a photo of your color-coded planner, caption it with this, and watch the 'literally me' replies roll in.
variations: Add: "I spend more time planning to study than actually studying."
Try: "Making the planner is the only thing I haven't procrastinated on this semester."

items.sourceNote: Dcard 廢文板 考前才開始整理桌面 register — 拖延心理學 frame

zh-tw.content:
考前一週，我突然發現：
房間好亂、書桌好髒、抽屜好像也該整理了。
我這輩子最熱愛打掃的時刻，
就是有別的事情該做的時候。
我不是在逃避，我是在創造一個可以好好讀書的環境，謝謝。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考前莫名其妙開始大掃除的人懂，發限動配張剛擦完的桌面照片簡直完美。
variations: 可以加：「整理完房間我才想起來，考試明天。」
也能換：「我的拖延等級已經進化到會偽裝成自律。」

en.content:
Week before the exam, I suddenly noticed:
the room is messy, the desk is filthy, the drawers need sorting.
The one time in my life I love cleaning
is when I have something else I should be doing.
I'm not avoiding studying. I'm creating an environment conducive to studying. Thanks.
en.editorNote: For anyone who's deep-cleaned their room the night before a final — pair with a freshly wiped desk pic.
variations: Add: "Finished cleaning, then remembered the exam is tomorrow."
Try: "My procrastination has evolved. It now disguises itself as discipline."

items.sourceNote: PTT 高中板 考完出考場 家長盤問 register — 家庭審訊 frame

zh-tw.content:
走出考場第一句話，
媽：「考得怎樣？」
我：「還好。」
媽：「還好是多好？」
我：「不知道。」
媽：「不知道是不是不好？」
我：「⋯⋯我可以先吃個飯嗎？」
考試考完了，但人生的第二場才剛開始。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考完從校門口走出來那段路根本是地獄門，朋友傳這段秒共鳴。
variations: 可以加：「我以為考完是解脫，原來只是換到下一個考官。」
也能換：「考卷不會追問細節，媽媽會。」

en.content:
First sentence after walking out of the exam:
Mom: "How'd it go?"
Me: "Okay."
Mom: "Okay how okay?"
Me: "I don't know."
Mom: "Does 'don't know' mean 'not good'?"
Me: "...Can I eat first?"
The exam is over. Round two of life is just beginning.
en.editorNote: The walk from the exam hall to the parent waiting outside is its own final boss. Send to the group chat for instant kinship.
variations: Add: "Thought finishing the exam was freedom. Turns out I just moved to the next examiner."
Try: "The test doesn't follow up. Mom does."

items.sourceNote: 考前查 ChatGPT 解題 register — AI 比我聰明 frame

zh-tw.content:
考前複習，我把不會的題目都丟給 ChatGPT。
ChatGPT 解得清清楚楚，我看完還是不會。
結論：知識存在這個世界上，
只是它不存在我的腦袋裡。
AI 救得了題目，救不了我。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考前夜熬夜抱 ChatGPT 的人都中槍，配張手機螢幕亮著的桌面照氣氛剛好。
variations: 可以加：「ChatGPT 是我的家教，但學費是我自己的學分。」
也能換：「我問 AI 一百題，AI 答對一百題，我考試還是零分。」

en.content:
Pre-exam review: I dumped every question I couldn't solve into ChatGPT.
ChatGPT explained it perfectly. I still didn't get it.
Conclusion: the knowledge exists in this world.
It just doesn't exist in my head.
AI can save the question. It can't save me.
en.editorNote: For the all-nighter crowd cuddling ChatGPT at 2 a.m. — pair with a glowing-screen-in-the-dark photo.
variations: Add: "ChatGPT is my tutor. Tuition is paid in my own GPA."
Try: "Asked AI a hundred questions. AI got a hundred right. I still bombed the test."

items.sourceNote: Dcard 考試板 考試廁所偷哭 register — 廁所避難所 frame

zh-tw.content:
考試考到一半，我舉手說我要去廁所。
不是真的想上廁所，
是想去一個沒有題目盯著我看的地方喘口氣。
廁所是我這個考場唯一的避難所，
也是少數沒有人會問我「會不會寫」的地方。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考到一半心理快斷線的考生秘密都懂，貼這段在限動配張洗手台照片很有戲。
variations: 可以加：「我洗了三次手，順便洗一下對人生的信心。」
也能換：「考場外的世界，從廁所那扇門開始。」

en.content:
Halfway through the exam, I raised my hand to go to the bathroom.
Not because I needed to go.
I just needed a place where the questions weren't staring at me.
The bathroom is the only sanctuary in this exam hall,
and one of the few places that doesn't ask if I know the answer.
en.editorNote: Every student who's escaped to the sink mid-exam knows. Caption a bathroom mirror pic for full effect.
variations: Add: "Washed my hands three times. Tried to wash my confidence back at the same time."
Try: "The outside world begins at the bathroom door."

items.sourceNote: Dcard 考試板 拖延症 register — 倒數計時 vs 開始讀書 frame

zh-tw.content:
我跟自己說六點開始讀書。
六點零一分：好啦，那就七點。
七點零一分：算了，明天再讀，今天就先當作休息日。
結果整個學期都是休息日。
zh-tw.editorNote: 拖延仔本人自介專用，貼在 IG 限動會被一票同學認領說「這是我」。
variations: 可以加：「我的人生只有兩個時段，等等開始讀，跟來不及讀。」
也能換：「今天本來要讀書，但今天天氣很適合躺著想讀書。」

en.content:
Told myself I'd start studying at 6:00.
6:01: "Okay, 7:00 it is."
7:01: "Tomorrow's better, today's a rest day."
Turns out the whole semester was a rest day.
en.editorNote: Procrastinator anthem. Caption a photo of your untouched textbook for maximum self-call-out.
variations: Try: "My life has two modes: about to start, and too late to start."
Add: "Today's weather was perfect for lying down and thinking about studying."

items.sourceNote: Finals week 四階段情緒 frame — Stage 1-4 心境變化

zh-tw.content:
考前四階段：
第一階段：我可以的。
第二階段：我好累。
第三階段：我什麼都不會。
第四階段：至少結束了。
我目前卡在第二跟第三階段之間，反覆橫跳。
zh-tw.editorNote: 期末週的萬用標題，貼出來大家會在底下回「我也是」、「+1」、「同步中」。
variations: 可以加：「第五階段：發現還有下一科。」
也能換：「我以為人生只有四階段，沒想到還有補考。」

en.content:
The four stages of exam week:
Stage 1: I've got this.
Stage 2: I'm so tired.
Stage 3: I know nothing.
Stage 4: At least it's over.
I'm currently bouncing between stage 2 and 3 on a loop.
en.editorNote: Universal finals-week caption. Watch the "same" replies pile up under your post.
variations: Add: "Stage 5: realizing there's another exam tomorrow."
Try: "Thought it was four stages. Forgot about the makeup exam."

items.sourceNote: Plan B 字母梗 frame — 26 letters + infinite emojis

zh-tw.content:
Plan A 不行沒關係，
還有 25 個英文字母可以選，
中文還有四千多個常用字，
emoji 表情符號甚至無限多種。
所以你看，根本沒有走投無路這件事，只有懶得換 plan 的人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考砸後想自我安慰、又怕太雞湯的時候用，幽默裡帶一點誠意。
variations: 可以加：「最差的 plan 也比沒 plan 好，至少有名字。」
也能換：「Plan A 失敗了，我們直接跳到 Plan Z，比較有戲劇張力。」

en.content:
If Plan A fails, there are 25 more letters.
And thousands of characters in other languages.
And literally infinite emojis.
So no, you're not out of options — you're just out of patience.
en.editorNote: For the post-exam pep talk that's funny enough not to feel like a Pinterest quote.
variations: Add: "Even Plan Z counts. At least it has a name."
Try: "Skip Plan B. Go straight to Plan Z — more dramatic."

items.sourceNote: 考試前一晚 vs 聖誕節前一晚 對照 register

zh-tw.content:
考試前一晚跟聖誕節前一晚有 87% 像：
都睡不著、
都在等奇蹟、
差別只在禮物會不會出現，
以及隔天醒來會不會哭。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考前失眠夜的限動專用文案，配張黑黑的天花板照片更悲壯。
variations: 可以加：「聖誕老人至少有送禮物，題本只送我精神創傷。」
也能換：「兩種夜晚都在許願，差別在一個是真的會實現。」

en.content:
The night before an exam is basically the night before Christmas:
you can't sleep,
you're praying for a miracle,
the only difference is whether there's a present in the morning,
and whether you cry when you wake up.
en.editorNote: Sleep-deprived study night caption. Pair with a photo of your dark ceiling for maximum drama.
variations: Add: "At least Santa delivers. The exam just delivered trauma."
Try: "Both nights are full of wishes. Only one of them comes true."

items.sourceNote: 臨時抱佛腳奧運化 register — cramming Olympic sport frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
如果臨時抱佛腳是奧運項目，
我從國小就在練了。
獎牌沒拿到，但我練出了世界級的心臟負荷量，
還有一張連咖啡都喝不出味道的味蕾。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考前一晚邊抖邊讀的限動神句，配張凌晨三點的桌面照剛剛好。
variations: 可以加：「我沒拿過書卷獎，但我的心律不整有奧運水準。」
也能改：「我練的是抱佛腳，不是讀書。這兩件事連姿勢都不一樣。」

en.content:
If cramming were an Olympic sport,
I'd have been training since elementary school.
No medals yet, but I've developed world-class heart-rate tolerance
and a tongue that can no longer taste coffee.
en.editorNote: For the 3am cram-session story post — caffeine-stained desk pic strongly recommended.
variations: Add: "Never made the honor roll, but my heart arrhythmia is Olympic-grade."
Try: "I trained for cramming, not studying. They're not even the same posture."

items.sourceNote: 我在壓力下表現最好 register — pressure lie frame 廢文化

zh-tw.content:
我都跟別人說：「我在壓力下表現最好。」
其實意思是：
沒壓力的時候我完全不動，
等到壓力像海嘯一樣撲過來，
我才會站起來說：「好啦，那我寫一下吧。」
這不叫高效，這叫被恐嚇。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合考前三天才打開課本的人發限動，留言區會排成一條「我也是」接龍。
variations: 可以加：「我說我抗壓性高，意思是我已經習慣被壓著走。」
也能改：「壓力是我的鬧鐘，沒響我絕對不起床。」

en.content:
I keep telling people: "I work best under pressure."
What I actually mean is:
without pressure I do absolutely nothing,
and only when it crashes in like a tidal wave
do I sit up and go, "Okay fine, I'll start now."
This isn't efficiency. This is being threatened.
en.editorNote: For the people who open the textbook three days before the exam — instant +1 magnet in any class chat.
variations: Add: "'High stress tolerance' just means I'm used to being shoved around."
Try: "Pressure is my alarm clock. Without the buzz, I don't get up."

items.sourceNote: 交卷後答案才浮現 register — answer surfaces after submission frame

zh-tw.content:
答案永遠在交卷那一秒才浮上來。
不是早一秒、不是晚一秒，
就是收卷老師把考卷從我桌上拿走的那一秒。
我的腦袋有一種叫做「不見棺材不掉淚」的奇妙設定，
而且每次都很準時。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考完走出考場那種「啊我會啊」的瞬間，發限動配張空教室照超有戲。
variations: 可以加：「我的腦袋是宅配，答案總是晚一個工作天送達。」
也能改：「答案在收卷的那一秒登場，像是來嘲笑我用的。」

en.content:
The answer always surfaces the exact second I hand in the paper.
Not a second early, not a second late —
right when the proctor lifts it off my desk.
My brain runs on a "no coffin no tears" setting,
and it is always perfectly on time.
en.editorNote: The walking-out-of-the-hall "oh wait I knew that" moment — empty-classroom shot pairs well.
variations: Add: "My brain ships answers like delivery: always one business day late."
Try: "The answer shows up the moment they take the paper away, like it came to mock me."

items.sourceNote: 螢光筆 = 讀書錯覺 register — highlighter delusion frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
我以為畫螢光筆就是讀書。
結果整本講義被我畫得像彩虹，
畫的時候我覺得我很懂，
考試的時候我發現我只懂顏色。
螢光筆是一種讓人覺得自己很努力的低成本道具。
zh-tw.editorNote: 讀書儀式感拉滿但腦袋空空的考生 OS，配張五顏六色的筆記照剛剛好。
variations: 可以加：「畫螢光筆 = 把不會的句子塗成你以為會的顏色。」
也能改：「我背的不是課文，是我自己畫的那條黃線。」

en.content:
I thought highlighting was studying.
My notes ended up looking like a rainbow.
While drawing the lines I felt like a genius.
During the exam I realized I only understood the colors.
Highlighters are a low-cost prop that makes you feel productive.
en.editorNote: For the aesthetic-study-girl spiral — pair with a flat-lay of a rainbow-coded notebook.
variations: Add: "Highlighting = painting the sentences you don't understand in the color you wish you did."
Try: "What I memorized wasn't the text. It was the yellow line I drew under it."

items.sourceNote: 選擇題 = 浪漫 register — multiple choice romantic frame 在地化廢文

zh-tw.content:
選擇題其實是最浪漫的題型。
它給你四個選項，
讓你以為你有選擇，
然後在你心動的那一秒，
告訴你：「都不對。」
跟我這輩子遇過的人差不多。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考完選擇題崩潰的高共鳴句，發限動會被前任默默已讀。
variations: 可以加：「四選一聽起來很簡單，直到那一就是不存在。」
也能改：「選擇題騙我，跟人生騙我用的是同一招。」

en.content:
Multiple choice is the most romantic question type.
It gives you four options,
makes you think you have a choice,
and the second your heart picks one,
it whispers: "None of these."
Kind of like every person I've ever dated.
en.editorNote: Post-exam heartbreak energy — your ex will see this and silently leave-read.
variations: Add: "Four options sounds easy until the right one just isn't there."
Try: "Multiple choice and life use the exact same con."

items.sourceNote: 考前 expectation vs reality register — split image meme 在地化

zh-tw.content:
我想像中的考前一晚：
桌面乾淨、筆記整齊、九點上床、香氛蠟燭。
實際上的考前一晚：
泡麵湯翻倒、講義疊成山、凌晨三點哭、香氛蠟燭已被淚水撲滅。
我每個學期都假裝這次會不一樣，每個學期都被自己騙。
zh-tw.editorNote: 拍兩張照片左右對比超有戲：左邊是 IG 假掰讀書圖，右邊是真實桌面，貼這段穩收 +1。
variations: 可以加：「想像中的我跟實際的我，可能上的不是同一所學校。」
也能改：「我每學期都做同樣的計畫，每學期都做同樣的崩潰。這叫人生循環賽。」

en.content:
Imagined night before the exam:
clean desk, neat notes, lights out by nine, candle lit.
Actual night before the exam:
spilled instant noodles, textbook avalanche, crying at 3am, candle drowned in tears.
Every semester I pretend it'll be different. Every semester I lie to myself.
en.editorNote: Split-image gold — left: aesthetic study pic, right: real desk. Drop this caption for instant +1s.
variations: Add: "Imagined me and actual me clearly attend different schools."
Try: "Same plan every semester. Same breakdown every semester. It's a subscription."

items.sourceNote: 考前 this is fine 燃燒房間 register — this is fine dog 在地化廢文

zh-tw.content:
整個房間都在燒，
我坐在中間說：「沒事，這樣就好。」
手裡還拿著一杯冷掉的咖啡，
旁邊是三本沒翻開的講義，
隔壁是明天早上八點的考試。
這不叫鎮定，這叫已經接受結局了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 改寫 this is fine 迷因的廢文版，考前一晚發出來保證同學秒回「我也是」。
variations: 可以加：「我不是在淡定，我是在認命。這兩件事在考前長得一模一樣。」
也能改：「房間在燒，我在坐。考試在追，我在躺。一切都很合理。」

en.content:
The whole room is on fire.
I'm sitting in the middle saying: "This is fine."
A cold coffee in one hand,
three unopened textbooks beside me,
an 8am exam tomorrow.
This isn't calm. This is full acceptance of the ending.
en.editorNote: The this-is-fine dog, exam edition — post the night before and watch the +1s pile up.
variations: Add: "Not zen. Just resigned. They look identical the night before a final."
Try: "Room burning. Me sitting. Exam coming. Me lying down. Everything checks out."

items.sourceNote: 考試 = 我把所有努力 outsource 給未來的我 register — future me frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
我從學期初就有一個完美的計畫：
把所有努力外包給期末週的我。
結果期末週的我打開信箱，
看到那封來自學期初的我的信，
只說了一句：「幹，不是說好你會處理嗎？」
zh-tw.editorNote: 拖延仔靈魂對話的精準翻譯，配張凌晨四點的螢幕照超有畫面。
variations: 可以加：「未來的我跟過去的我已經正式絕交，現在的我夾在中間裝沒事。」
也能改：「我把責任傳給下一個我，下一個我也很有禮貌，又傳給下一個。」

en.content:
I had a perfect plan since week one:
outsource all the work to finals-week me.
Then finals-week me opened the inbox,
found the letter from week-one me,
and it just said: "Wait, weren't YOU supposed to handle this?"
en.editorNote: Translation of the universal procrastinator inner dialogue — pair with a 4am glowing-screen pic.
variations: Add: "Future me and past me have officially blocked each other. Present me is awkwardly stuck in the middle."
Try: "I passed the task to next me. Next me politely passed it to the me after that."

items.sourceNote: 分科測驗 7/11-12 暑假苦讀 register — 別人放假我重練 frame

zh-tw.content:
暑假的限動分成兩種：
別人是海邊、演唱會、出國玩。
我是同一張書桌、同一杯冰美式、同一頁卡了三天的物理。
別人在過暑假，我在過分科。
zh-tw.editorNote: 分科測驗考生七月的真實寫照，發出去同分科的同學會集體已讀（因為都在讀書）。
variations: 可以加：「我的暑假回憶只剩冷氣的溫度跟參考書的厚度。」
也能改：「別人在收集照片，我在收集模擬考考卷。」

en.content:
Summer stories come in two kinds:
theirs — beaches, concerts, trips abroad.
Mine — same desk, same iced americano, same physics page I've been stuck on for three days.
They're having a summer. I'm having a subject exam.
en.editorNote: The July reality of every subject-exam student — post it and your study buddies leave you on read (because they're studying).
variations: Add: "My only summer memories are the AC temperature and the thickness of my workbook."
Try: "They collect photos. I collect mock exam papers."

items.sourceNote: 明天再開始 迴圈 register — tomorrow loop frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
我每天都跟自己說：「明天一定開始認真讀。」
然後我已經連續說了三十天。
所以嚴格來講，我不是沒讀書，
我是把同一個決心，每天認真地重新許了一次。
zh-tw.editorNote: 拖延仔的最高境界，發出去留言區會有人接「我也是，從上學期就在說明天」。
variations: 可以加：「我最有恆心的事，就是每天準時延後我的恆心。」
也能改：「明天的我已經被我預支太多次，現在欠債纍纍。」

en.content:
Every day I tell myself: "Tomorrow I'll really start studying."
I've said this thirty days in a row now.
So technically I haven't been slacking —
I've been faithfully renewing the exact same resolution every single day.
en.editorNote: Peak procrastinator energy — post it and someone replies "same, I've been saying tomorrow since last semester."
variations: Add: "The most consistent thing I do is postpone my consistency."
Try: "I've borrowed so much from tomorrow-me that I'm now drowning in debt."

items.sourceNote: 作息崩壞 register — 日夜顛倒 frame 在地化廢文

zh-tw.content:
考前我的作息是這樣的：
凌晨三點精神最好，早上八點最想死。
偏偏考試是早上八點。
所以我每天都在最清醒的時候睡，在最該清醒的時候昏迷。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考前作息整個壞掉的考生 OS，配張凌晨三點的書桌燈照超寫實。
variations: 可以加：「我跟太陽的關係，從考前那週正式破裂。」
也能改：「我的生理時鐘現在用的是別的星球的時區。」

en.content:
Here's my pre-exam schedule:
peak focus at 3am, peak despair at 8am.
Guess what time the exam is. 8am.
So I sleep when I'm sharpest and pass out when I most need to be awake.
en.editorNote: For the completely wrecked sleep schedule — pair with a 3am desk-lamp photo.
variations: Add: "Me and the sun officially broke up during exam week."
Try: "My body clock is currently running on a different planet's time zone."

items.sourceNote: 公式背了忘 register — 考完才想起來 frame

zh-tw.content:
公式我背了一整晚，
進考場前一秒還記得，
翻開考卷那一刻它就跟我說再見。
等到交卷、走出校門、踏上公車那一刻——它回來了。
它只是不喜歡考試的氣氛而已。
zh-tw.editorNote: 公式總在考完才浮現的崩潰，傳到班群一定有人回「公式：我喜歡放學後再出現」。
variations: 可以加：「公式跟靈感一樣，都挑你最不需要的時候出現。」
也能改：「我背的不是公式，是公式願不願意陪我進考場的心情。」

en.content:
I memorized the formula all night.
Still had it one second before walking in.
The moment I opened the paper, it waved goodbye.
Then I handed in the paper, left the building, stepped onto the bus — and it came right back.
It just doesn't like the exam atmosphere.
en.editorNote: The formula that only resurfaces after the test — drop it and someone replies "the formula prefers showing up after school."
variations: Add: "Formulas are like inspiration — they show up exactly when you don't need them."
Try: "I wasn't memorizing the formula. I was memorizing whether it felt like joining me in the hall."

items.sourceNote: 考後無限腦補 register — 每天後悔那一題 frame

zh-tw.content:
考完之後我才發現，真正的考試現在才開始。
白天我假裝沒事，晚上我躺在床上，
把那一題重寫了一百遍，每一遍的答案都不一樣。
原來最折磨人的不是考卷，是考完後那個停不下來的我。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考完那種「腦袋自動重播+無限後悔」的高共鳴句，建議搭配勸自己別再想了的語氣發。
variations: 可以加：「我已經在腦中把那一題訂正了，可惜分數不會自己改。」
也能改：「考完最該交出去的不是考卷，是我這顆停不下來的腦袋。」

en.content:
After the exam I realized the real exam was just beginning.
By day I pretend I'm fine. At night I lie in bed
and rewrite that one question a hundred times — a different answer every time.
Turns out the cruelest part isn't the paper. It's the me that won't stop replaying it.
en.editorNote: For the post-exam overthinking spiral — best paired with a gentle "please let it go" tone.
variations: Add: "I've corrected that question in my head. Too bad the score won't correct itself."
Try: "The thing I really should've handed in wasn't the paper. It was this brain that won't shut off."

items.sourceNote: 考場掉筆 register — 第七題魔咒 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
平常我的筆好端端躺在筆袋裡。
偏偏每次都在寫到第七題、腦袋正轉得最順的時候，
它從桌上滾下去，滾到全考場最遠的那個角落。
墨菲定律不放過任何一個正在認真的考生。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考場掉筆的崩潰瞬間大家都懂，傳到班群一定有人回「+1，而且還是滾到別人腳邊」。
variations: 可以加：「掉的不是筆，是我剛剛好不容易接上的思緒。」
也能改：「我的筆只在最關鍵的那一題決定要去探索地板。」

en.content:
Most of the time my pen just sits politely in the case.
But somehow it always rolls off the desk right at question seven,
the exact moment my brain finally got going,
and it rolls to the farthest corner of the entire hall.
Murphy's Law never spares a student who's actually trying.
en.editorNote: The universal dropped-pen panic — post it and someone replies "same, and it rolled under a stranger's foot."
variations: Add: "I didn't drop a pen. I dropped the train of thought I just barely caught."
Try: "My pen only decides to explore the floor on the most important question."

items.sourceNote: 考場時鐘標語 register — time will pass will you frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
考場牆上那個時鐘，
它好像在對我說：「時間一定會過，那你呢？」
我抬頭看它三十次，
它過了三十分鐘，而我，原地不動。
結論：會走的只有它，不會走的只有我。
zh-tw.editorNote: 盯著考場時鐘發呆又腦袋空白的高共鳴句，配張時鐘特寫照超有畫面。
variations: 可以加：「時鐘比我有決心，它從來沒有想交白卷。」
也能改：「它叫做時鐘，我叫做時間靜止。」

en.content:
That clock on the exam hall wall
feels like it's whispering: "Time will pass. Will you?"
I looked up at it thirty times,
it moved thirty minutes, and I stayed exactly where I was.
Conclusion: the only thing moving forward in this room is the clock.
en.editorNote: For staring-at-the-clock-while-blank energy — pair with a close-up of an exam hall clock.
variations: Add: "The clock has more determination than me. It never thought about handing in a blank."
Try: "It's called a clock. I'm called time standing still."

items.sourceNote: 115 分科測驗 7/11-12 倒數 register — 學測完還有一場 frame

zh-tw.content:
別人放暑假，我準備分科測驗。
七月十一、十二號這兩天，
是我整個夏天唯一記得的日期。
海邊、演唱會、出國玩，跟我說的那種暑假，
要等到七月十三號才正式開賣。
zh-tw.editorNote: 分科測驗考生的六月內心戲，看著同學放暑假自己還在拚的那種，發出去同類秒懂。
variations: 可以加：「我的暑假分成兩段：考前的地獄，跟考後的補眠。」
也能改：「七月十二號之前，夏天對我來說只是一個比較熱的考季。」

en.content:
Everyone else is on summer break. I'm prepping for the subject exam.
July 11th and 12th
are the only dates I remember from the entire summer.
The beach, the concerts, the trips abroad — the summer everyone keeps describing —
doesn't officially go on sale until July 13th.
en.editorNote: June reality for subject-exam students watching everyone else vacation — fellow grinders will get it instantly.
variations: Add: "My summer comes in two parts: pre-exam hell, then post-exam catch-up sleep."
Try: "Before July 12th, summer is just a hotter exam season to me."

items.sourceNote: 省電模式 register — energy-saving mode frame 在地化廢文

zh-tw.content:
我不是懶，
我只是進入了「考試結束前一律省電」的模式。
非必要不移動、非必要不思考、非必要不社交，
所有電量全部留給那兩天的考場。
等考完，我會自動恢復出廠設定——也就是繼續耍廢。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考前那種「只剩呼吸功能」的省電狀態，發限動配張癱在沙發上的照片超傳神。
variations: 可以加：「我的低電量警告從上禮拜就一直亮著，但我拒絕充電。」
也能改：「考完不是恢復元氣，是從省電模式切換成飛航模式。」

en.content:
I'm not lazy.
I've just entered "power-saving mode until exams are over."
No unnecessary movement, no unnecessary thinking, no unnecessary socializing —
all battery reserved for those two days in the hall.
Once it's done, I'll reset to factory settings — which is, of course, more lounging around.
en.editorNote: For the pre-exam "breathing-only" energy-saving state — pair with a melted-into-the-couch photo.
variations: Add: "My low-battery warning has been blinking since last week, but I refuse to charge."
Try: "After the exam I don't recharge — I just switch from power-saving mode to airplane mode."

items.sourceNote: 凌晨下載知識 register — download 2 months into 1 brain buffering frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
凌晨兩點，
我試著把兩個月的進度下載進腦袋。
進度條卡在 37％ 不動，
然後跳出一行字：「儲存空間不足，請刪除部分回憶。」
於是我刪掉了快樂的童年，騰出空間背公式。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考前一夜瘋狂塞知識又當機的高共鳴句，配張凌晨書桌一片狼藉的照片超有畫面。
variations: 可以加：「下載失敗的原因是：我的腦袋還在用免費版。」
也能改：「兩個月的東西塞一晚，難怪我整個人都在轉圈圈讀取中。」

en.content:
2 AM,
I'm trying to download two months of material into my brain.
The progress bar is stuck at 37%,
then a message pops up: "Storage full. Please delete some memories."
So I deleted my happy childhood to make room for formulas.
en.editorNote: For the cram-night-buffering crisis — pair with a photo of a chaotic 2 AM desk.
variations: Add: "Download failed because my brain is still running the free version."
Try: "Cramming two months into one night — no wonder I'm just a spinning loading wheel."

items.sourceNote: 咖啡機交往 register — committed relationship with coffee maker frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
目前的感情狀態：
跟我的咖啡穩定交往中，而且感情很好。
它從不已讀不回，每天準時陪我熬夜，
還願意接受我半夜三點的情緒勒索。
等考完，我大概會為它哭著辦一場分手儀式。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考季只剩咖啡陪讀的厭世幽默，配張第三杯黑咖啡的照片正中紅心。
variations: 可以加：「我們之間沒有秘密，因為它知道我所有的崩潰時刻。」
也能改：「考完我要戒咖啡，但我們會保持朋友關係。」

en.content:
Current relationship status:
in a committed, very happy relationship with my coffee.
It never leaves me on read, shows up on time every all-nighter,
and accepts my 3 AM emotional blackmail without complaint.
When exams end, I'll probably cry through our breakup ceremony.
en.editorNote: Exam-season-only-friend-is-caffeine humor — pair with a photo of your third black coffee.
variations: Add: "We have no secrets. It knows every single one of my breakdowns."
Try: "After exams I'm quitting coffee, but we'll stay friends."

items.sourceNote: 115 分科測驗 7/11-12 倒數 register — 同學放榜我還在拚 frame

zh-tw.content:
六月的班群很安靜，
因為一半的人已經放榜上岸了，
另一半，包括我，還在為分科測驗倒數。
他們在群組分享系隊迎新照片，
我在分享：「自然第三章我又忘記了。」
同一個群組，兩個季節。
zh-tw.editorNote: 六月分科考生看著同學上岸自己還在拚的內心戲，發出去同類秒懂秒哭。
variations: 可以加：「他們的夏天從六月開始，我的夏天從七月十三號開始。」
也能改：「我不是不替他們開心，我只是還沒有資格開心。」

en.content:
The group chat is quiet in June,
because half of us already got our offers and made it ashore,
and the other half — me included — are still counting down to the subject exam.
They're sharing department orientation photos.
I'm sharing: "I forgot chapter three of science again."
Same chat, two different seasons.
en.editorNote: June reality for subject-exam students watching classmates celebrate — fellow grinders will feel this one.
variations: Add: "Their summer starts in June. Mine starts on July 13th."
Try: "I'm not unhappy for them. I just haven't earned the right to be happy yet."

items.sourceNote: 學測國寫 集體療癒 register — 作文寫到哭 frame 在地化廢文

zh-tw.content:
國寫題目要我寫「跟家人之間說不出口的話」。
我寫到一半開始哭，
不是因為我有多深刻，
是因為我突然發現：原來我連這題都比平常作文還會寫。
考試最殘忍的地方，是它逼出了我最真的情緒，然後給它打分數。
zh-tw.editorNote: 國寫考到內心被翻出來那種又痛又好笑的狀態，傳到班群會引發一整排「我也是」。
variations: 可以加：「考完才發現，最會寫的那篇，是我最不想交出去的那篇。」
也能改：「它要我寫真心話，然後用紅筆評估我的真心值幾分。」

en.content:
The essay prompt asked me to write "the things I can never say to my family."
I started crying halfway through —
not because I'm some deep soul,
but because I realized I wrote that one better than any practice essay.
The cruelest thing about exams: they squeeze out your most honest feelings, then grade them.
en.editorNote: For the gut-punch-essay moment that's somehow both painful and funny — drop in the group chat for a chorus of 'same.'
variations: Add: "Turns out the essay I wrote best was the one I least wanted to hand in."
Try: "It asked for my true feelings, then graded my sincerity in red pen."

items.sourceNote: 分科測驗 7/11-12 倒數 register — 全世界放暑假只有我在讀 frame

zh-tw.content:
全世界都在放暑假，
只有分科生的暑假是「同一間房間，換季的版本」。
窗外有人去海邊，我在算第三題的加速度。
別人曬黑了，我曬的是檯燈。
zh-tw.editorNote: 六月分科考生看著別人放暑假自己還在拚的限動神句，配張書桌前檯燈的照片超有畫面。
variations: 可以加：「我的暑假地點：書桌。停留時間：到七月十二號。」
也能改：「別人的暑假在打卡，我的暑假在打考古題。」

en.content:
The whole world is on summer break.
For a subject-exam kid, summer is just "same room, seasonal edition."
Outside, people head to the beach. I'm calculating acceleration on question three.
Others get a tan. I get a desk-lamp glow.
en.editorNote: For June grinders watching everyone else vacation — pair with a photo of your desk lamp at night.
variations: Add: "My summer destination: the desk. Check-out date: July 12th."
Try: "Their summer is photo check-ins. Mine is past-paper check-ins."

items.sourceNote: 拖延信用卡比喻 register — procrastination credit card 在地化

zh-tw.content:
拖延就像刷信用卡。
當下爽得要命，反正帳單還沒來。
直到考前一週，帳單一次寄到，
而且利息是用我的睡眠跟自尊在算的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考前一週才開始還拖延債的考生 OS，配張凌晨書桌堆一疊講義的照片正中紅心。
variations: 可以加：「我這張拖延卡額度很高，但還款能力是零。」
也能改：「現在不讀很爽，是因為痛苦被分期到考前那一晚一次付清。」

en.content:
Procrastination is like a credit card.
Feels amazing now, because the bill hasn't arrived.
Then the week before the exam, the whole statement lands at once,
and the interest is charged in sleep and self-esteem.
en.editorNote: For anyone paying off procrastination debt the week before finals — pair with a 2am photo of a textbook pile.
variations: Add: "My procrastination card has a huge limit and zero repayment ability."
Try: "Skipping study feels great because the pain is installment-billed to exam night."

items.sourceNote: 凌晨三點讀書 register — study best at 3am 在地化廢文

zh-tw.content:
我讀書效率最高的時段，是凌晨三點。
剛好就是考試當天的凌晨三點。
原來我不是不會讀，
我只是需要全世界都睡著、再加上一點即將崩潰的恐懼，才開得了機。
zh-tw.editorNote: 凌晨爆發型考生的限動文案，配張三點半天還沒亮的窗外照超寫實。
variations: 可以加：「我的大腦是夜間限定營業，而且只接急件。」
也能改：「白天的我在裝忙，凌晨三點的我才是真正的我。」

en.content:
My peak study hour is 3 AM.
Specifically, 3 AM on the day of the exam.
Turns out I can study just fine —
I just need the whole world asleep plus a dash of impending doom to boot up.
en.editorNote: For the 3am-deadline-warrior crowd — caption a still-dark window photo for full effect.
variations: Add: "My brain is night-shift only, and it only takes emergency orders."
Try: "Daytime me is fake-busy. 3 AM me is the real one."

items.sourceNote: 分科寫考古題越寫越慌 register — 歷屆試題 frame

zh-tw.content:
我寫分科考古題的規律是：
寫越多，慌越多。
第一年覺得自己有救，第二年發現第一年只是還沒看到難題，
寫到第三年，我開始懷疑命題老師是不是專門研究怎麼讓人懷疑人生。
zh-tw.editorNote: 六月狂寫歷屆試題越寫越沒信心的分科生 OS，傳到讀書群會引起一整排「越寫越想哭」。
variations: 可以加：「考古題不是讓我準備好，是讓我提前體驗崩潰。」
也能改：「我寫的不是歷屆，是歷年來打擊我的合輯。」

en.content:
Here's my pattern doing past papers for the subject exam:
the more I do, the more I panic.
Year-one paper: I think I'm fine. Year-two: I realize year-one just hadn't shown me the hard ones yet.
By year-three I'm convinced the test setters major in making people question their existence.
en.editorNote: For June grinders losing confidence with every past paper — drop in the study chat for a chorus of 'the more I do the more I want to cry.'
variations: Add: "Past papers don't prepare me. They just let me preview the breakdown."
Try: "I'm not doing past papers. I'm doing a greatest-hits album of things that have crushed me."

items.sourceNote: 假裝讀書到考完 register — pretend to study until exam ends 在地化

zh-tw.content:
我的讀書計畫只有一條：
假裝在讀書，一直假裝到考完為止。
書攤開、筆拿著、檯燈亮著，姿勢百分百，進度百分之零。
連我自己都差點被我騙過去。
zh-tw.editorNote: 看起來很認真其實在放空的考生最懂，配張書攤開但眼神死的自拍剛剛好。
variations: 可以加：「我不是在讀書，我是在 cosplay 一個在讀書的人。」
也能改：「我的書沒翻頁，但我的姿勢很努力。」

en.content:
My entire study plan is one step:
pretend to study, and keep pretending until the exam is over.
Book open, pen in hand, lamp on — posture 100%, progress 0%.
I almost fooled even myself.
en.editorNote: For the looks-focused-but-totally-zoned-out crowd — pair with a book-open dead-eyes selfie.
variations: Add: "I'm not studying. I'm cosplaying someone who studies."
Try: "My book hasn't turned a page, but my posture is really trying."

items.sourceNote: GPA 求生意志 同趨勢線 register — same trend line frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
我的成績跟我的求生意志，這學期走的是同一條曲線。
而且兩條都在往下，跌得很有默契。
它們唯一的合作，就是一起放棄我。
zh-tw.editorNote: 期末成績出來那種心也涼了的限動文案，配張往下的折線圖迷因超有戲。
variations: 可以加：「老師說這叫『穩定下滑』，我說這叫『手牽手一起掉』。」
也能改：「我的分數跟心情，今天正式同分。」

en.content:
My GPA and my will to live are tracking the same line this semester.
Both heading down, in perfect sync.
Their only collaboration is giving up on me together.
en.editorNote: For the grades-just-dropped chill — pair with a downward-trend graph meme for full effect.
variations: Add: "Teacher calls it a 'steady decline.' I call it 'falling hand in hand.'"
Try: "My score and my mood are officially tied today."

items.sourceNote: 畢業歸功咖啡谷歌前座 register — owe diploma to coffee Google frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
如果我能畢業，
我要感謝三個人：
咖啡、估狗，還有坐我前面那位筆記寫超滿的同學。
至於我自己，這次就先不點名了，怕他承受不起這份榮耀。
zh-tw.editorNote: 畢業季半開玩笑的感謝文，貼在限動配張畢業帽照片剛剛好。
variations: 可以加：「我的畢業證書應該掛三個人的名字，只是我沒空格寫了。」
也能改：「謝謝前座同學的後腦勺，那是我這學期最熟的風景。」

en.content:
If I graduate,
I owe it to three things:
coffee, Google, and the classmate in front of me whose notes were way too detailed.
As for myself, I'll skip the shout-out this time — wouldn't want the honor to overwhelm me.
en.editorNote: Graduation-season half-joke gratitude post — pair with a grad-cap photo.
variations: Add: "My diploma should have three names on it. There just wasn't enough space."
Try: "Shout-out to the back of the head of the kid in front of me — my most familiar view all semester."

items.sourceNote: 分科社會組 六月衝刺 register — 背科背到懷疑年代 frame

zh-tw.content:
六月背歷史背到一個境界：
我記得發生過什麼，但記不得是哪一年、哪個朝代、誰做的。
所以我現在對歷史的理解是：
「總之就是有人做了什麼，然後後果由我在考場承擔。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 分科社會組六月狂背的考生 OS，傳到讀書群會引起一整排「歷史我只剩印象派」。
variations: 可以加：「我背的不是年代，是一團模糊的『古代』。」
也能改：「歷史考的是事件，我答的是氛圍。」

en.content:
After cramming history all of June, I've reached a state:
I remember something happened — just not the year, the era, or who did it.
So my grasp of history now is basically:
"Someone did something, and I'm the one paying for it in the exam hall."
en.editorNote: For June humanities crammers — drop in the study chat for a wave of 'history is just a vibe to me now.'
variations: Add: "I'm not memorizing dates. I'm memorizing a fuzzy blob labeled 'ancient times.'"
Try: "The exam tests events. I'm answering with atmosphere."

items.sourceNote: 我來我見我崩潰 register — came saw panicked frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
我來，我看，我崩潰。
凱撒征服世界用三句，
我征服一張考卷也用三句，只是順序跟結局都跟他相反。
他贏，我交白卷。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考場崩潰文的高級版，懂歷史梗的同學會在留言區多按一個讚。
variations: 可以加：「凱撒說 veni vidi vici，我說 veni vidi 然後就沒有 vici 了。」
也能改：「我來、我看、我把名字寫完就沒招了。」

en.content:
I came, I saw, I panicked.
Caesar conquered the world in three words.
I conquered one exam paper in three too — just with the order and the ending reversed.
He won; I handed in a blank.
en.editorNote: The upgraded exam-meltdown caption — history-meme fans will throw an extra like in the comments.
variations: Add: "Caesar said veni vidi vici. I said veni vidi and then nothing."
Try: "I came, I saw, I finished writing my name and ran out of moves."

items.sourceNote: 咖啡因強度生活 register — life at several degrees of caffeine frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
我現在的人生有好幾種強度，
而其中大部分都是咖啡因。
我已經分不清是我在喝咖啡，
還是咖啡在借我的身體加班。
zh-tw.editorNote: 期末熬夜灌咖啡的考生限動標配，配張桌上一排空杯的照片超寫實。
variations: 可以加：「我的血液濃度，咖啡跟血應該各占一半。」
也能改：「不是我撐著沒睡，是咖啡因不准我睡。」

en.content:
My life runs at several intensities right now,
and most of them are caffeine.
I can't tell anymore if I'm drinking the coffee
or the coffee is borrowing my body to pull an all-nighter.
en.editorNote: Finals-week all-nighter staple — pair with a photo of a row of empty cups on the desk.
variations: Add: "My bloodstream is probably half blood, half coffee at this point."
Try: "I'm not the one staying awake. The caffeine won't let me sleep."

items.sourceNote: 115 分科測驗 7/11-12 倒數 register — 暑假被沒收 frame

zh-tw.content:
別人放暑假，我放分科。
七月十一號之前，我的行事曆只有一個顏色，
那個顏色叫做：等一下再說。
等到考完那天，暑假大概只剩下一個禮拜跟一張成績單。
zh-tw.editorNote: 分科考生六月專屬限動，配張曬不到太陽的書桌照超應景，朋友看了會默默按愛心。
variations: 可以加：「我的暑假不是放的，是分科借走的。」
也能改：「七月一到，全世界在玩水，我在玩數甲。」

en.content:
Everyone else gets summer break. I get the subject exam.
Before July 11th, my calendar is one single color,
and that color is called: I'll deal with it later.
By the time it's over, summer is just one leftover week and a score report.
en.editorNote: June-only story-post for subject-exam crammers — pair with a photo of a sun-starved desk.
variations: Add: "My summer wasn't a break. The exam borrowed it and never gave it back."
Try: "July hits, the world hits the beach, I hit the calculus."

items.sourceNote: study cry repeat register — no sleep no peace frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
我六月的日常只有三個動作：
讀書、哭、重來。
沒有睡眠，也沒有平靜，
只有一個循環跑到天亮，跑到我分不清今天是禮拜幾。
zh-tw.editorNote: 分科六月衝刺期的崩潰限動標配，配張凌晨書桌照，讀書群會排出一整列「+1」。
variations: 可以加：「禮拜幾不重要，重要的是離考試還剩幾天。」
也能改：「我的作息表只有兩格：醒著讀書、累到讀不下去。」

en.content:
My entire June is just three moves on repeat:
study, cry, repeat.
No sleep, no peace,
just one loop running till sunrise, till I can't tell what day it is.
en.editorNote: Peak June-sprint meltdown caption — pair with a 3am desk photo and watch the study chat fill with '+1'.
variations: Add: "The day of the week doesn't matter. The days left until the exam do."
Try: "My schedule has two slots: awake and studying, too tired to study."

items.sourceNote: brain in airplane mode register — 大腦飛航模式 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
考試期間我的大腦自動開了飛航模式。
收得到訊息，但什麼都回不出來。
別人問我懂不懂，我點頭；
其實裡面只有一個轉圈圈的讀取圖示，轉了三天還沒跑完。
zh-tw.editorNote: 分科讀到大腦當機的考生 OS，傳到班群一秒引發「我也是已讀不回狀態」接龍。
variations: 可以加：「我不是不會，我是大腦在背景更新，請稍候。」
也能改：「腦袋顯示『連線中』，已經連線了一整個禮拜。」

en.content:
During exam season my brain switches itself to airplane mode.
It receives the messages but can't send anything back.
Someone asks if I get it, I nod;
inside there's just a spinning loading icon that's been spinning for three days straight.
en.editorNote: For the brain-buffering phase of cramming — drop in the group chat for a wave of 'read but cannot reply.'
variations: Add: "I'm not clueless. My brain is updating in the background. Please wait."
Try: "My head says 'connecting...' and has been connecting for a whole week."

items.sourceNote: bed refused to let me study register — 床的引力 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
我試著讀書，但我的床不准。
它說：「躺一下就好。」
那一下，從下午一點到隔天的太陽。
我輸給的不是怠惰，是一張比命題老師更有說服力的床。
zh-tw.editorNote: 分科衝刺期間躺平失敗的考生限動，配張陷進棉被的自拍超有共感，留言會排「床是我的天敵」。
variations: 可以加：「全世界最難的考題，是怎麼從床上站起來。」
也能改：「我跟床的關係，比我跟課本還親密。」

en.content:
I tried to study, but my bed wouldn't allow it.
It said: "Just lie down for a sec."
That sec ran from one in the afternoon to the next morning's sun.
I didn't lose to laziness — I lost to a bed more persuasive than any test setter.
en.editorNote: For the failed-to-get-up cram day — pair with a buried-in-blankets selfie and watch 'the bed is my nemesis' roll in.
variations: Add: "The hardest exam question in the world is how to stand up off the bed."
Try: "My relationship with my bed is closer than the one with my textbook."

items.sourceNote: 重考 vs 分科 二選一 register — 多給自己一次機會 frame

zh-tw.content:
有人說再考一次是浪費時間。
但分科這條路我選了，就不是浪費，是我願意為自己多賭一次。
時間從來不是被考試浪費的，
是被「不敢再試一次」的那個念頭偷走的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 送給猶豫要不要拚分科或重考的朋友，比一句「加油」更有重量，適合考前打氣。
variations: 可以加：「賭輸了也沒關係，至少我知道我有試過。」
也能改：「多考一次不是退步，是我給自己的第二份志願。」

en.content:
People say taking the exam again is a waste of time.
But I chose this path, so it isn't a waste — it's me willing to bet on myself one more time.
Time is never wasted by an exam.
It's stolen by the thought that says 'don't you dare try again.'
en.editorNote: For the friend torn over whether to take another shot at the exam — heavier than a plain 'good luck,' great for a pep talk.
variations: Add: "Even if the bet doesn't pay off, at least I'll know I tried."
Try: "Taking it again isn't a step back. It's a second wish I'm granting myself."

items.sourceNote: 115 分科測驗 7/11-12 倒數一個月 register — 時間錯覺 frame

zh-tw.content:
倒數計時器顯示還有一個月。
我心裡的進度條顯示還有一章。
這兩個數字唯一的共通點，
是它們都不打算等我。
zh-tw.editorNote: 六月分科衝刺期的限動標配，配張倒數 App 截圖，讀書群會排一整列「我也是」。
variations: 可以加：「倒數一個月，我的待讀清單卻還在倒數第一頁。」
也能改：「時間一直跑，只有我的進度卡在 loading。」

en.content:
The countdown timer says one month left.
My internal progress bar says one chapter in.
The only thing these two numbers have in common
is that neither of them plans to wait for me.
en.editorNote: June subject-exam sprint caption — pair with a countdown-app screenshot and the study chat fills with '+1'.
variations: Add: "One month left on the clock. My reading list is still on page one."
Try: "Time keeps running. Only my progress is stuck on loading."

items.sourceNote: study all night on social media register — 假裝讀書 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
我昨晚熬夜苦讀，
讀的是別人考上的限動、補習班的招生文、還有一篇陌生人的考試心得。
書桌上的課本翻開在同一頁，
見證了我一整晚的努力，跟它無關。
zh-tw.editorNote: 假裝在讀書其實在滑手機的考生 OS，配張課本攤開但螢幕亮著的照片超寫實。
variations: 可以加：「我讀了一整晚，只是讀的不是我要考的東西。」
也能改：「熬夜不等於讀書，這是我用一整晚換來的結論。」

en.content:
I pulled an all-nighter studying hard last night.
I studied other people's 'I got in' stories, cram-school ads, and one stranger's exam review.
The textbook on my desk stayed open to the same page,
silently witnessing a whole night of effort that had nothing to do with it.
en.editorNote: For the 'studied all night... on my phone' confession — pair with an open-textbook-glowing-screen photo.
variations: Add: "I studied all night. Just not the thing I'm being tested on."
Try: "An all-nighter isn't the same as studying. That's the one thing I learned all night."

items.sourceNote: panic plus caffeine register — 恐慌加咖啡因 公式 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
我的應考公式是：
恐慌 ＋ 咖啡因 ＝ 最後一刻的奇蹟。
問題是這個公式我每次都套，
奇蹟卻是抽獎制的，今年會不會中，沒人知道。
zh-tw.editorNote: 靠咖啡跟焦慮硬撐的考生限動，配張第幾杯咖啡的照片，留言會排「精準描述」。
variations: 可以加：「咖啡因負責清醒，恐慌負責動力，分數負責隨緣。」
也能改：「我不是在準備考試，我是在等奇蹟發貨。」

en.content:
My exam formula is:
panic + caffeine = a last-minute miracle.
Problem is, I run this formula every single time,
but the miracle works on a lottery system — no telling if it pays out this year.
en.editorNote: For the running-on-coffee-and-anxiety crowd — pair with a 'cup number whatever' photo for instant 'this is me' replies.
variations: Add: "Caffeine handles being awake, panic handles motivation, the score handles itself."
Try: "I'm not preparing for the exam. I'm waiting for a miracle to ship."

items.sourceNote: exams sneak up like ninjas register — 考試像忍者 比喻在地化

zh-tw.content:
考試像忍者，總是無聲無息地接近。
你以為還很遠，回頭一看它已經站在你背後，
手裡拿著一張你沒讀到的考卷，
笑著對你說：「久等了。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 覺得考試突然就到眼前的考生 OS，傳到班群一秒引發「對它真的會偷襲」接龍。
variations: 可以加：「我以為我有時間，結果時間是忍者，它早就潛伏在我身邊。」
也能改：「考試不會大聲走來，它會在你放鬆的那天突然出現。」

en.content:
Exams are like ninjas — they always approach in total silence.
You think it's still far away, then you turn around and it's standing right behind you,
holding a paper full of stuff you never studied,
smiling and saying: "Took you long enough."
en.editorNote: For the 'how is the exam already here' panic — drop in the group chat for a chorus of 'it really does ambush you.'
variations: Add: "I thought I had time. Turns out time is a ninja, and it was right beside me all along."
Try: "Exams never arrive loudly. They show up the day you finally relax."

items.sourceNote: download knowledge buffering register — 大腦下載中 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
凌晨兩點，我試著把兩個月的進度，
一次下載進這顆腦袋。
結果它顯示：「下載中，預估剩餘時間：來不及。」
進度條卡在 99％，剩下那 1％，就是我考試會的部分。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考前臨時抱佛腳到天亮的考生限動，配張凌晨書桌照，留言會排「我的進度條也卡住」。
variations: 可以加：「腦袋容量已滿，請刪除一些不必要的回憶再試一次。」
也能改：「我不是沒讀，是進度條卡在 99％ 永遠跑不完。」

en.content:
Two in the morning, I'm trying to download two months of material
into this one brain all at once.
It shows: "Downloading, estimated time remaining: too late."
The progress bar is stuck at 99% — and that last 1% is the part I'll actually know on the exam.
en.editorNote: For the cram-till-sunrise crowd — pair with a 3am desk photo and watch 'my progress bar is frozen too' roll in.
variations: Add: "Brain storage full. Please delete some unnecessary memories and try again."
Try: "It's not that I didn't study. My progress bar is just frozen at 99% forever."

items.sourceNote: 115 分科測驗 7/11-12 兩天四節 register — 縮短天數但沒縮短痛苦 frame

zh-tw.content:
今年分科從三天縮成兩天，
大家都說「省一天好幸福」。
結果痛苦沒有變少，只是壓得更密集。
原來他們省的是天數，不是我的命。
zh-tw.editorNote: 分科縮天數消息出來後的考生 OS，傳到讀書群會排一整列「以為解脫結果更累」。
variations: 可以加：「兩天考完聽起來輕鬆，實際上是把三天的崩潰塞進兩天。」
也能改：「天數變少，但每一節我崩潰的濃度變高了。」

en.content:
This year the subject exam shrank from three days to two.
Everyone said "one less day, what a blessing."
Turns out the suffering didn't shrink — it just got more concentrated.
They saved a day. They didn't save me.
en.editorNote: For when 'shorter exam' turns out to mean 'denser pain' — drop in the study chat for a chorus of 'thought it'd be easier.'
variations: Add: "Two days sounds chill until you realize they crammed three days of breakdown into it."
Try: "Fewer days, but the breakdown-per-session ratio went way up."

items.sourceNote: fluent in studying the night before register — 考前一晚才流利 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
我精通一種讀書法：考前一晚速成班。
平常一頁要看三天，
考前那晚我可以一小時翻完整本。
問題是這種能力只有在來不及的時候才會解鎖。
zh-tw.editorNote: 拖到最後一晚才開機的考生限動，配張凌晨翻書照，留言會排「這超級是我」。
variations: 可以加：「我的專注力是考前限定款，平常不出貨。」
也能改：「我不是不會讀書，我是只有在來不及的時候才會。」

en.content:
