I'm fluent in exactly one study method: the night-before crash course.
Normally one page takes me three days.
The night before, I can flip the whole book in an hour.
Problem is, this skill only unlocks once it's already too late.
en.editorNote: For the chronic last-night crammer — pair with a 2am book-flipping photo and watch 'literally me' roll in.
variations: Add: "My focus is a limited edition — pre-exam only, never restocked."
Try: "It's not that I can't study. I just can only do it when it's already too late."

items.sourceNote: 個人申請結束 vs 拚分科 抉擇 register — 已錄取卻不甘心 frame

zh-tw.content:
我手上已經有一個錄取，
但我還是報了分科。
不是那個學校不好，
是我想知道，再拚一次的我，可以走到哪裡。
安全牌我留著，賭注我自己下。
zh-tw.editorNote: 送給已經有錄取卻決定再拚分科的朋友，比「加油」更懂他的兩難，適合衝刺期打氣。
variations: 可以加：「我不是不滿足，是我想對得起那個還想再試的自己。」
也能改：「錄取通知是地板，分科是我想踮腳碰的天花板。」

en.content:
I already have an offer in hand,
but I signed up for the subject exam anyway.
Not because that school isn't good enough —
but because I want to know how far the me who tries one more time can go.
I'm keeping the safe card. I'm placing the bet myself.
en.editorNote: For the friend with an offer who chose to gamble on one more exam — gets the dilemma better than a plain 'good luck.'
variations: Add: "It's not that I'm unsatisfied. I want to do right by the me who still wants to try."
Try: "The acceptance letter is my floor. The subject exam is the ceiling I'm reaching for."

items.sourceNote: plan panic pass survive register — 計畫恐慌求生 三階段在地化

zh-tw.content:
我的備考流程只有三步：
訂計畫、爆恐慌、求生還。
通過是 bonus，活著就算贏。
至於那張漂亮的讀書計畫表，
它在第二步就已經陣亡了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 衝刺期把目標從「考高分」降級成「活著走出考場」的考生 OS，傳班群秒引發接龍。
variations: 可以加：「我的目標不是上榜，是平安回家。」
也能改：「計畫、恐慌、求生，這三步我每次都很穩，穩穩地原地踏步。」

en.content:
My exam prep has exactly three steps:
make a plan, full panic, survive.
Passing is a bonus — staying alive already counts as a win.
As for that beautiful study schedule,
it died somewhere around step two.
en.editorNote: For when your goal downgrades from 'ace it' to 'walk out breathing' — instant group-chat relate.
variations: Add: "My goal isn't to pass. It's to make it home."
Try: "Plan, panic, survive — I nail all three every time. Nailing them in place, going nowhere."

items.sourceNote: summer studying while everyone else relaxes register — 全世界放暑假只有我在讀 frame

zh-tw.content:
全世界都在放暑假，
限動裡都是海邊、冷氣、手搖跟笑容。
只有我，在七月最熱的時候，
抱著一本參考書，
替全班守著最後一個還沒下課的教室。
zh-tw.editorNote: 分科考生七月還在衝刺、看著同學玩瘋的孤單限動，配張只有自己亮燈的書桌照超有畫面。
variations: 可以加：「別人的暑假是放假，我的暑假是加映場。」
也能改：「我不是不想去海邊，是我先去考場替大家探路。」

en.content:
The whole world is on summer break.
Everyone's story is beaches, AC, bubble tea, and smiles.
Just me, in the hottest week of July,
clutching a review book,
holding down the last classroom that never got to dismiss.
en.editorNote: For the July subject-exam grinder watching everyone else's vacation — pair with a lone-desk-lamp photo for full loneliness.
variations: Add: "Everyone else's summer is a break. Mine is an extra screening."
Try: "It's not that I don't want the beach. I'm just scouting the exam hall for everyone first."

items.sourceNote: 115 分科測驗 7/11-12 倒數一個月 register — 暑假變第三學期 frame

zh-tw.content:
別人的暑假從放榜開始，
我的暑假從分科測驗結束才開始。
所以嚴格來說，
我這個暑假只有兩個月，
而學校偷偷把第三學期塞了進來。
zh-tw.editorNote: 分科考生七月還在備戰、看著同學早早放假的限動神句，配張月曆被紅筆圈住 7/11 的照片更有畫面。
variations: 可以加：「我的暑假是有附帶條件的，條件叫做分科測驗。」
也能改：「同學在倒數放假，我在倒數開考，明明是同一個七月。」

en.content:
Everyone else's summer starts on results day.
Mine doesn't start until after the subject exam.
So technically my summer is only two months long,
and the school quietly slipped in a third semester.
en.editorNote: For the July subject-exam grinder watching classmates clock out early — pair with a calendar photo of the exam date circled in red.
variations: Add: "My summer comes with terms and conditions. The condition is the subject exam."
Try: "They're counting down to vacation. I'm counting down to an exam. Same July."

items.sourceNote: procrastination is my cardio register — 拖延運動化 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
醫生問我有沒有運動習慣。
我說有，我每天都在拖延。
從打開課本到真正讀進去那段心理拉扯，
消耗的熱量絕對不輸跑步機。
zh-tw.editorNote: 幫自己的拖延找藉口時的萬用句，配張攤在沙發上手裡還抓著課本的廢照剛剛好。
variations: 可以加：「我不是懶，我是把運動量都花在猶豫要不要讀書上。」
也能改：「拖延是我唯一持之以恆的有氧運動。」

en.content:
My doctor asked if I exercise.
I said yes — I procrastinate daily.
The mental tug-of-war between opening the book and actually reading it
burns more calories than a treadmill.
en.editorNote: The all-purpose excuse for your own procrastination — pair with a couch-slumped photo, textbook still in hand.
variations: Add: "I'm not lazy. I spend all my energy deciding whether to study."
Try: "Procrastinating is the only cardio I've ever stayed consistent with."

items.sourceNote: 2 AM download knowledge register — 凌晨下載知識 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
凌晨兩點，
我試圖把兩個月的進度，
一次下載進這顆只有 8GB 的腦袋。
結果跳出的不是「下載完成」，
是「儲存空間不足，是否刪除睡眠？」
zh-tw.editorNote: 考前一夜瘋狂塞知識的限動文案，配張凌晨書桌只剩檯燈亮著的照片超寫實。
variations: 可以加：「我選了刪除睡眠，結果連原本記得的也一起被清掉了。」
也能改：「腦袋容量沒升級，我的野心倒是每年都在更新。」

en.content:
2 AM,
I'm trying to download two months of material
into this brain that ships with only 8GB.
Instead of "download complete" it popped up:
"Storage full — delete sleep to continue?"
en.editorNote: For the night-before cram spiral — pair with a 2am desk photo lit by a single lamp.
variations: Add: "I chose to delete sleep. It also wiped the stuff I already remembered."
Try: "My brain never got a storage upgrade. My ambition updates every year."

items.sourceNote: study group 20/30/50 register — 讀書會分工真相 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
我們開了一個讀書會。
二成的時間在讀書，
三成在互相解釋誰也不會的題目，
剩下五成在一起懷疑當初為什麼選這個科系。
所以讀書會最大的收穫，是確認了我們一起爛。
zh-tw.editorNote: 揪讀書會結果變聊天會的考生 OS，傳到群組保證有人回「這就是我們」。
variations: 可以加：「讀書會唯一複習成功的，是去年的八卦。」
也能改：「我們不是來讀書的，是來確認彼此都沒讀。」

en.content:
We started a study group.
20% of the time we study,
30% we explain questions none of us understand,
and 50% we sit there questioning why we picked this major.
The real takeaway from study group: confirming we're all equally doomed.
en.editorNote: For the study group that became a chat group — post it and watch someone reply "this is literally us."
variations: Add: "The only thing our study group successfully reviewed was last year's gossip."
Try: "We're not here to study. We're here to confirm none of us did."

items.sourceNote: exams don't scare me my procrastination does register — 真正的恐懼來源 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
考試本身不可怕。
真正讓我半夜驚醒的，
是那個明明知道要讀、
卻一路滑手機滑到考前一晚的自己。
敵人從來不是考卷，是鏡子裡那位。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考前自我覺察又救不了自己的限動文案，配張深夜手機螢幕亮著的自拍剛剛好。
variations: 可以加：「考卷我還有機會猜，我自己的拖延我連猜都不敢猜。」
也能改：「會讓我考砸的不是難題，是那個說『等一下再讀』的我。」

en.content:
The exam itself isn't what scares me.
What jolts me awake at night
is the version of me who knew I had to study
and scrolled my phone right up to the night before.
The enemy was never the test paper — it's the one in the mirror.
en.editorNote: For the pre-exam self-awareness that still can't save you — pair with a late-night selfie lit by a phone screen.
variations: Add: "I can at least guess on the test. My own procrastination I can't even predict."
Try: "It's not the hard questions that'll sink me. It's the me who said 'I'll study in a bit.'"

items.sourceNote: 115 分科測驗 7/11-12 倒數一個月 register — 八科自由選考 frame

zh-tw.content:
分科測驗最自由的地方，是科目可以自己選。
最不自由的地方，是不管選哪科，
打開講義那一刻，我都一樣不會。
所以我選的不是科目，是要被哪一科電。
zh-tw.editorNote: 分科前一個月選考糾結的考生 OS，傳到班群保證有人回「選擇你想死的方式」。
variations: 可以加：「自由選考的意思是：自由地選一個會讓你後悔的未來。」
也能改：「我以為選考是權利，後來發現它是判決。」

en.content:
The free part about this exam is you get to pick your subjects.
The un-free part is that no matter which I pick,
the second I open the textbook I'm equally lost.
So I'm not choosing a subject — I'm choosing which one gets to wreck me.
en.editorNote: For the agony of picking electives a month before the exam — post it and someone replies "choose your fighter."
variations: Add: "Free choice of subjects just means freely choosing a future you'll regret."
Try: "I thought picking subjects was a right. Turns out it's a sentence."

items.sourceNote: 115 分科測驗 不考國英 register — 學測成績沿用 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
分科不考國文英文，
因為這兩科直接沿用學測成績。
意思是：那兩科我考爛的後果，
會像影子一樣一路跟到分科。
原來有些錯，是會分期付款追著你跑的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 學測國英失常又要拚分科的考生 OS，傳到重考群會引起一排「+1」。
variations: 可以加：「我以為學測結束了，結果它只是換了個方式繼續折磨我。」
也能改：「分科不考國英，但國英會用成績單默默地補刀。」

en.content:
This exam doesn't test Chinese or English —
those scores just carry over from the earlier exam.
Meaning: the way I bombed those two
follows me here like a shadow.
Turns out some mistakes come with an installment plan that chases you down.
en.editorNote: For anyone whose earlier-exam scores haunt the next round — drop it in the resit chat for a chorus of "same."
variations: Add: "I thought that exam was over. It just changed costume and kept tormenting me."
Try: "The scores don't reset. They just follow you to the next building."

items.sourceNote: my brain is 90% song lyrics 10% exam knowledge register — 記憶分配 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
我的腦容量分配是這樣的：
九成裝廣告歌跟迷因，
一成裝考試會用到的東西。
而且偏偏考前那一晚，
還是那九成在我腦袋裡開演唱會。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考前明明要背書腦袋卻自動播放神曲的考生 OS，配個耳機放在課本上的照片剛剛好。
variations: 可以加：「我記得每一句洗腦廣告詞，就是記不得課本第三章。」
也能改：「我的記憶體很大，只是全被沒用的東西先佔走了。」

en.content:
Here's how my memory is allocated:
90% jingles and memes,
10% things that actually show up on the exam.
And of course, the night before the test,
it's the 90% throwing a concert in my head.
en.editorNote: For when your brain auto-plays a catchy ad instead of chapter three — pair with a photo of earbuds resting on a textbook.
variations: Add: "I remember every line of that annoying jingle. Chapter three, not so much."
Try: "My memory has tons of storage. It's just all taken up by useless stuff first."

items.sourceNote: time to forget everything in 3 2 1 register — 考完瞬間清空 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
考完最後一科那一刻，
我大腦啟動了自動清除程式。
三、二、一——清空完畢。
剛剛那些公式去哪了我不知道，
我只知道我現在連自己背過它們都不記得。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考完走出考場腦袋瞬間格式化的考生 OS，配張交完卷比讚的自拍很搭。
variations: 可以加：「我不是學完就忘，我是交卷的同時連同記憶一起繳回去了。」
也能改：「考完三秒，我的腦袋已經回到出廠設定。」

en.content:
The moment I handed in the last paper,
my brain ran its auto-wipe.
Three, two, one — cleared.
Where those formulas went I have no idea.
I don't even remember that I once memorized them.
en.editorNote: For the post-exam brain format — pair with a thumbs-up selfie taken right after handing in the paper.
variations: Add: "I don't forget after learning. I turn in the memory along with the paper."
Try: "Three seconds after the exam, my brain was back to factory settings."

items.sourceNote: GPA and my mood have a complicated relationship register — 成績與心情連動 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
我的心情跟我的成績，是一段很複雜的關係。
它好，我就好；它不好，我整個人就跟著沉。
問題是它從來沒問過我願不願意，
就擅自決定了我今天能不能笑得出來。
zh-tw.editorNote: 放榜當天心情被分數綁架的考生 OS，傳到班群會有人回「成績單就是我的情緒開關」。
variations: 可以加：「我不是情緒化，我只是把心情的主控權外包給了成績單。」
也能改：「成績一出，我的快樂就被設成了唯讀。」

en.content:
My mood and my grades have a very complicated relationship.
When it's good, I'm good; when it's bad, I sink right along with it.
The problem is it never asks for my consent —
it just decides whether I get to smile today.
en.editorNote: For results day when a number hijacks your whole vibe — post it and someone replies "my report card is my mood switch."
variations: Add: "I'm not moody. I just outsourced control of my feelings to a grade report."
Try: "The grades dropped and my happiness got set to read-only."

items.sourceNote: 115 分科測驗 7/11-12 倒數約一個月 register — 暑假被沒收 frame

zh-tw.content:
別人的暑假從七月開始。
我的暑假從七月十三號開始。
中間那兩天叫做分科測驗，
是這個世界跟我收的「進場費」。
繳完才准放假，逾期不候。
zh-tw.editorNote: 分科前一個月看著別人放暑假自己還在拚的考生 OS，傳到班群會引起一排「同病相憐」愛心。
variations: 可以加：「我的暑假不是延後，是要先通關才解鎖。」
也能改：「七月十三號之前，我沒有暑假，只有考程。」

en.content:
Everyone else's summer starts in July.
Mine starts on July 13th.
The two days before that are the exam —
the entry fee this world charges me
before I'm allowed to rest. No refunds, no extensions.
en.editorNote: For watching everyone else's vacation start while you're still grinding — drop it in the group chat for a wave of "same" hearts.
variations: Add: "My summer isn't delayed. It's locked behind a boss fight."
Try: "Before the 13th, I don't have a summer. I have a test schedule."

items.sourceNote: panic now cry later somehow pass register — 三步驟讀書法 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
我的讀書三步驟很穩定：
先慌、再哭、最後莫名其妙低空飛過。
這套流程我已經跑了三年，
從來沒準備好過，
但也從來沒真的死過，神奇。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考前明明沒讀完卻又每次低空通關的考生 OS，配個攤在書堆上的自拍剛剛好。
variations: 可以加：「我不是有實力，我是有運氣加上一點不要臉。」
也能改：「慌、哭、過——這三個字就是我的考試攻略全文。」

en.content:
My three-step study method is very reliable:
panic first, cry next, then somehow scrape a pass.
I've run this routine for three years straight.
Never once been ready,
yet never actually died. Honestly impressive.
en.editorNote: For the chronic last-minute survivor who keeps clearing the bar somehow — pair with a selfie collapsed on a pile of books.
variations: Add: "It's not skill. It's luck plus a little shamelessness."
Try: "Panic, cry, pass — that's my entire exam strategy in three words."

items.sourceNote: local student discovers textbook exists register — 課本陌生人 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
考前三天，我翻開課本，
它跟我對看了三秒。
那一刻我們都很尷尬——
它不認識我，我也不認識它。
原來整個學期，我們只是同班同學，不是朋友。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考前才第一次認真翻課本的考生 OS，配張全新到反光的課本照超有畫面。
variations: 可以加：「我跟課本的關係，止步於『點頭之交』。」
也能改：「課本：好久不見。我：我們見過嗎？」

en.content:
Three days before the exam I opened the textbook.
We stared at each other for three seconds.
It was awkward for both of us —
it didn't recognize me, and I didn't recognize it.
Turns out all semester we were just classmates, never friends.
en.editorNote: For cracking the book open for the first time right before the test — pair with a photo of a textbook so pristine it still shines.
variations: Add: "Me and my textbook? Strictly a nodding acquaintance."
Try: "Textbook: long time no see. Me: have we met?"

items.sourceNote: I came I saw I panicked register — 凱撒名言惡搞 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
凱撒說：「我來，我見，我征服。」
我說：「我來，我看，我傻眼。」
進考場、翻考卷、瞬間失去語言能力，
三步驟一氣呵成，比羅馬帝國垮得還快。
zh-tw.editorNote: 拿到考卷瞬間腦袋空白的考生 OS，配張一臉死寂的考場自拍很搭。
variations: 可以加：「征服世界很難，征服這張考卷我連邊都沒摸到。」
也能改：「我來，我看，我交白卷。」

en.content:
Caesar said: "I came, I saw, I conquered."
I say: "I came, I saw, I blanked."
Walk in, flip the paper, instantly lose the ability to speak —
three steps, seamless, falling faster than the Roman Empire.
en.editorNote: For the mind-goes-blank moment of opening the paper — pair with a dead-eyed exam-hall selfie.
variations: Add: "Conquering the world is hard. I didn't even get near conquering this test."
Try: "I came, I saw, I left it blank."

items.sourceNote: 分科測驗 7/11-12 倒數一個月 register — 暑假被綁架 frame

zh-tw.content:
別人的暑假從六月放到開學，
我的暑假被分科測驗綁在七月中。
所以我現在不是在放暑假，
是在替七月那兩天，先繳一個月的焦慮當訂金。
zh-tw.editorNote: 分科測驗倒數一個月、看著別人放暑假的考生 OS，配張開著冷氣讀書的桌面照超有共鳴。
variations: 可以加：「我的暑假是分期付款，七月考完才一次入帳。」
也能改：「七月十一號之前，我沒有暑假，只有倒數。」

en.content:
Everyone else's summer runs from June to the new term.
Mine is hostage to a test in mid-July.
So I'm not on vacation right now —
I'm paying a month of anxiety up front as a deposit on those two days.
en.editorNote: For watching everyone's summer start while you grind toward a July test — pair with a photo of your desk under the AC.
variations: Add: "My summer is on an installment plan. It only pays out once the test is over."
Try: "Before July 11th, I don't have a summer. I have a countdown."

items.sourceNote: brain 90% song lyrics 10% knowledge register — 腦容量分配 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
我的腦袋容量分配是這樣的：
九成是歌詞跟迷因，一成是考試範圍。
難怪我背不起公式——
那一成的空間，早就被昨天循環的副歌占滿了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 讀不進書、腦袋卻記得整首歌的考生 OS，配個邊讀書邊戴耳機的自拍剛剛好。
variations: 可以加：「課文記不住，但廣告台詞我能一字不漏。」
也能改：「我的記憶體很滿，只是裝的都不是考試會考的東西。」

en.content:
Here's how my brain allocates storage:
ninety percent song lyrics and memes, ten percent exam material.
No wonder the formulas won't stick —
that ten percent got claimed by the chorus I had on loop yesterday.
en.editorNote: For the brain that won't hold a formula but knows every word of a song — pair with a headphones-on study selfie.
variations: Add: "Can't recall the textbook, but I've got the ad jingle memorized word for word."
Try: "My memory's full. Just not with anything that's on the test."

items.sourceNote: energy-saving mode until exams over register — 省電模式 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
我不是懶，
我是開了省電模式，
要等考試結束才會恢復滿速運轉。
問題是這個模式我從學期初就開著，
而那顆「考完再說」的按鈕，按到現在還沒亮。
zh-tw.editorNote: 整學期都在「考完再說」的考生自我平反，配張攤在沙發上的廢人自拍超精準。
variations: 可以加：「省電模式的副作用是：連讀書的力氣也一起省掉了。」
也能改：「我沒有關機，我只是把效能調到剛好能呼吸。」

en.content:
I'm not lazy.
I'm in energy-saving mode,
full speed won't resume until exams are over.
Problem is I switched it on at the start of the semester,
and the "deal with it after the test" button still hasn't lit up.
en.editorNote: Self-defense for anyone who's been on 'after the exam' mode all term — pair with a collapsed-on-the-couch selfie.
variations: Add: "Side effect of energy-saving mode: it also saved up the energy I needed to study."
Try: "I'm not shut down. I just dialed performance to barely-breathing."

items.sourceNote: A+xiety wordplay register — 焦慮雙關 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
我想要的是 A＋，
拿到的是 A 開頭的焦慮（anxiety）。
原來這兩個從頭到尾共用同一個開頭，
而我這幾年努力的，好像一直是後面那個。
zh-tw.editorNote: 想拿高分結果只收穫焦慮的考生 OS，配張盯著成績欄發呆的迷因效果最強。
variations: 可以加：「我的成績單上沒有 A＋，但我的精神狀態全是 A 開頭的字。」
也能改：「想要 A＋，得到 anxiety，這大概就是考試最誠實的兌換率。」

en.content:
What I wanted was an A+.
What I got was A-xiety.
Turns out they share the exact same opening letter,
and the thing I've actually been earning all these years is the second one.
en.editorNote: For chasing top marks and collecting stress instead — pair with a meme of someone staring blankly at a grade column.
variations: Add: "No A+ on my report card, but my mental state is all A-words."
Try: "Want an A+, get anxiety — honestly the most honest exchange rate exams offer."

items.sourceNote: finals = how clean your room can get register — 整理逃避 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
考試真正測驗的，
是你的房間能被整理到多乾淨。
我這禮拜把抽屜分了類、衣櫃換了季、書桌擦到反光，
唯一沒碰的，是那本明天要考的課本。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考前突然有強烈打掃慾的考生 OS，配張亮晶晶但課本沒翻的書桌照超寫實。
variations: 可以加：「我的房間從沒這麼整齊過，因為我的腦袋從沒這麼想逃過。」
也能改：「不是我愛乾淨，是課本太可怕，連灰塵都比它好相處。」

en.content:
What exams really test
is how spotless your room can get.
This week I sorted every drawer, swapped my whole closet, polished my desk till it shines —
the only thing I didn't touch is the textbook I'm tested on tomorrow.
en.editorNote: For the sudden urge to deep-clean before a final — pair with a sparkling desk and an unopened book.
variations: Add: "My room has never been this clean, because my brain has never wanted to flee this badly."
Try: "I'm not tidy. The textbook is just scarier than dust."

items.sourceNote: coffee vs sleep tradeoff register — 用睡眠換清醒 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
咖啡是給那些明天要考有機化學、又不能睡的人喝的。
我喝了三杯，換來一整晚的清醒，
然後在考卷上，把這份清醒全部還了回去。
等價交換，一滴都沒賺到。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考前靠咖啡硬撐、考場卻當機的考生自我吐槽，配張排成一列的空咖啡杯照剛剛好。
variations: 可以加：「咖啡因不會讓我變聰明，只會讓我清醒地看著自己不會寫。」
也能改：「我用睡眠換清醒，考場用清醒換我崩潰，這條供應鏈非常順暢。」

en.content:
Coffee is for people who can't sleep because organic chem is tomorrow morning.
I drank three cups, traded them for a whole night awake,
then handed all that alertness right back on the answer sheet.
A fair exchange — didn't profit a single drop.
en.editorNote: For surviving on caffeine the night before and blanking anyway — pair with a row of empty cups.
variations: Add: "Caffeine doesn't make me smarter. It just keeps me awake to watch myself not know the answer."
Try: "I traded sleep for alertness, the exam traded alertness for my breakdown — very smooth supply chain."

items.sourceNote: 100% sure I studied just forgot where register — 讀過但忘了放哪 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
我百分之百確定我讀過這個，
我只是想不起來我把它讀到哪去了。
知識在我腦袋裡，就像收進一個我自己也找不到密碼的雲端，
檔案都在，就是打不開。
zh-tw.editorNote: 明明複習過、考場卻一片空白的考生內心戲，傳到班群會收到整排「+1」。
variations: 可以加：「不是我沒讀，是我的腦袋把它存成了唯讀檔，還忘了給我權限。」
也能改：「我記得我懂過，這份記得本身，就是我考場上唯一的答案。」

en.content:
I'm 100% sure I studied this.
I just can't remember where I filed it.
Knowledge sits in my head like a cloud drive I locked myself out of —
the files are all there, they just won't open.
en.editorNote: For reviewing everything and blanking anyway — drop it in the group chat for a chorus of '+1'.
variations: Add: "I did study. My brain just saved it as read-only and forgot to give me access."
Try: "I remember understanding it once. That memory was my only answer in the exam."

items.sourceNote: 分科測驗 7 月 暑假考試 register — 別人放暑假我在考 frame

zh-tw.content:
全世界都在放暑假，
只有分科測驗的考生在七月走進冷氣壞掉的考場。
別人曬的是海邊的太陽，
我曬的是日光燈，還曬出了黑眼圈。
zh-tw.editorNote: 分科測驗在暑假考、看著朋友出去玩的考生 OS，配張窗外大太陽、桌上講義的對比照超有感。
variations: 可以加：「我的暑假行程只有一個地點，叫做考場。」
也能改：「別人在數浪，我在數還剩幾題不會寫。」

en.content:
The whole world is on summer break,
and only the subject-exam kids are walking into a July exam hall with broken AC.
Everyone else is soaking up the beach sun.
I'm soaking up fluorescent light — and growing dark circles.
en.editorNote: For the summer-exam crowd watching friends post vacation pics — pair a sunny window with a desk of review sheets.
variations: Add: "My entire summer itinerary has one location: the exam hall."
Try: "They're counting waves. I'm counting how many questions I still can't answer."

items.sourceNote: brain 90% song lyrics 10% knowledge register — 腦容量分配 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
我的腦袋有百分之九十存的是歌詞，
剩下百分之十才是考試範圍。
所以考卷上我什麼都想不起來，
但隔壁班播一首歌，我能跟著唱完整首副歌。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考前發現腦袋裝錯東西的考生 OS，配張戴耳機唸書、書卻沒翻的迷因效果最強。
variations: 可以加：「老師問我課文背得怎樣，我只能回他：『要不要聽我唱歌？』」
也能改：「考試考的是課本，我會的全在 KTV 點歌單裡。」

en.content:
Ninety percent of my brain is song lyrics.
The remaining ten percent is the exam scope.
So on the paper I can't recall a thing,
but play one song next door and I'll nail the entire chorus.
en.editorNote: For realizing your brain stored the wrong files before an exam — pair with a headphones-on, book-unopened meme.
variations: Add: "Teacher asked how my recitation was going. All I could say was: 'Wanna hear me sing instead?'"
Try: "The exam tests the textbook. Everything I know lives in my karaoke queue."

items.sourceNote: study break longer than study session register — 休息比讀書久 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
我讀十五分鐘，休息四十五分鐘。
嚴格說起來，這不是讀書配休息，
是休息中間穿插了一點讀書。
我的進度條跑得比我的休息時間慢多了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 讀沒幾分鐘就想滑手機的考生自我吐槽，配張書攤開但人躺平的限動超寫實。
variations: 可以加：「我把番茄鐘設成『讀五分鐘、躺一小時』，效率高到自己都怕。」
也能改：「我不是在讀書中間休息，是在休息中間不小心讀到書。」

en.content:
I study for fifteen minutes and rest for forty-five.
Technically that's not studying with breaks —
it's resting with the occasional study sprinkled in.
My progress bar moves way slower than my break timer.
en.editorNote: For the kind of cram session where the breaks outlast the studying — pair with an open book and a flopped-over selfie.
variations: Add: "I set my Pomodoro to 'study five minutes, lie down one hour.' Terrifyingly efficient."
Try: "I'm not taking breaks between studying. I'm accidentally studying between breaks."

items.sourceNote: 分科歷屆越寫越慌 register — 寫越多越沒信心 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
歷屆試題越寫越慌。
寫第一回我覺得自己還有救，
寫到第五回我開始懷疑這幾年到底在學校做了什麼。
原來考古題的功能不是複習，是讓我提前認清現實。
zh-tw.editorNote: 分科測驗前狂寫考古題、越寫越沒信心的考生 OS，配張寫滿紅筆叉叉的考卷照超有感。
variations: 可以加：「考古題教會我的不是知識，是接受失敗的能力。」
也能改：「我不是越寫越強，是越寫越清楚自己有多弱。」

en.content:
The more past papers I do, the more I panic.
After the first one I thought there was hope.
By the fifth I started questioning what I'd been doing in school all these years.
Turns out past papers aren't for review — they're for facing reality early.
en.editorNote: For grinding past exams before a big test and losing confidence with each one — pair with a paper covered in red X's.
variations: Add: "Past papers didn't teach me knowledge. They taught me how to accept defeat."
Try: "I'm not getting stronger with each one. I'm just getting clearer on how weak I am."

items.sourceNote: when in doubt C in doubt register — 不會就選 C frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
不會的時候就選 C。
這是我從國小用到現在的策略，
命中率穩定維持在四分之一。
與其說是答題，不如說是我跟出題老師之間的一場擲筊。
zh-tw.editorNote: 選擇題全靠直覺猜的考生自嘲，配張答案卡塗成一直線的迷因效果最強。
variations: 可以加：「我的答案卡看起來不像在考試，像在畫抽象藝術。」
也能改：「三長一短選最短，四個都長我選 C，這就是我的全部準備。」

en.content:
When in doubt, pick C.
I've used this strategy since elementary school,
with a hit rate steadily holding at one in four.
It's less answering questions and more a coin flip between me and the test setter.
en.editorNote: For the student whose multiple-choice plan is pure vibes — pair with an answer sheet bubbled into a straight line.
variations: Add: "My answer sheet doesn't look like an exam. It looks like abstract art."
Try: "Three long one short, pick the short. All four long, pick C. That's my entire prep."

items.sourceNote: not drunk just finals week register — 期末憔悴 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
我沒喝醉，我只是在期末週。
走路會撞牆、講話會跳針、看人會對焦三秒，
這些都不是酒精的功勞，
是連續熬夜加上對人生的全面放棄。
zh-tw.editorNote: 期末週把人榨乾、整個人恍神的考生 OS，配張黑眼圈深到不行的自拍剛剛好。
variations: 可以加：「我這個狀態不需要喝酒，期末週已經幫我搞定了。」
也能改：「別人喝醉是放鬆，我這樣是期末週的標準配備。」

en.content:
I'm not drunk, I'm just in finals week.
Walking into walls, talking in loops, taking three seconds to focus on a face —
none of it is alcohol.
It's back-to-back all-nighters plus a total surrender to life.
en.editorNote: For looking absolutely wrecked during finals — pair with a selfie sporting the deepest possible eye bags.
variations: Add: "I don't need a drink to look like this. Finals week handled it."
Try: "For other people being drunk is relaxing. For me this is just standard finals issue."

items.sourceNote: brain 90% song lyrics register — 大腦記憶體配置 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
我的大腦記憶體：
九成是歌詞，一成是考試範圍。
所以考前我能完整唱完三張專輯，
卻背不起來一條公式。
看來我的腦袋從一開始就選錯了主修。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考前發現自己只記得起歌詞的考生 OS，配張戴耳機翻課本的限動超有畫面。
variations: 可以加：「公式進不去，副歌一聽就會。我的腦袋有它自己的標準。」
也能改：「我不是記性差，我是把記憶體留給更重要的歌單。」

en.content:
My brain's storage:
ninety percent song lyrics, ten percent exam material.
Before the test I can sing three full albums front to back,
but I can't remember a single formula.
Guess my brain picked the wrong major from day one.
en.editorNote: For the student who realizes they only retained lyrics — pair with a headphones-and-textbook story shot.
variations: Add: "Formulas won't go in. The chorus loads instantly. My brain has its own standards."
Try: "I don't have a bad memory. I just saved the storage for a better playlist."

items.sourceNote: study breaks longer than sessions register — 休息與讀書比例失衡 frame

zh-tw.content:
我的讀書空檔比讀書時間還長。
讀十分鐘，休息一小時。
嚴格說起來，
我不是在讀書中間休息，
是在休息中間不小心讀了一下書。
zh-tw.editorNote: 明明坐在書桌前一整天卻什麼都沒讀進去的考生 OS，配張螢幕停在 YouTube 的桌面照超寫實。
variations: 可以加：「我的番茄鐘只剩番茄，鐘早就被我關掉了。」
也能改：「別人讀書休息五分鐘，我休息讀書五分鐘。」

en.content:
My study breaks are longer than my study sessions.
Ten minutes of reading, one hour of rest.
Strictly speaking,
I'm not resting between studying —
I accidentally studied a bit between resting.
en.editorNote: For the student who sat at the desk all day and absorbed nothing — pair with a desktop frozen on YouTube.
variations: Add: "My pomodoro timer is all tomato, no timer. I muted that part ages ago."
Try: "Other people study, then rest five minutes. I rest, then study five minutes."

items.sourceNote: pen writes faster when clueless register — 不會寫反而寫更快 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
奇怪的是，
我越不會的題目，筆寫得越快。
會的題目我慢慢寫，怕寫錯；
不會的題目我用力寫，怕停下來就被自己看穿。
所以滿滿一頁答案，其實是滿滿一頁的心虛。
zh-tw.editorNote: 申論題不會寫卻硬要湊滿格子的考生 OS，配張寫得密密麻麻卻離題的考卷迷因效果最強。
variations: 可以加：「字寫越多代表我越不確定，這是考卷的隱藏密碼。」
也能改：「我不是文思泉湧，我是在用字數掩護我的空白。」

en.content:
Funny thing —
the less I know an answer, the faster my pen moves.
I write slowly on the ones I know, scared of a slip;
I write furiously on the ones I don't, scared that stopping will give me away.
So a full page of answers is really a full page of bluffing.
en.editorNote: For padding an essay question you have no clue about — pair with a meme of a densely written but off-topic paper.
variations: Add: "More words means less certainty. That's the hidden code of every exam sheet."
Try: "It's not inspiration flowing. It's word count covering for the blank in my head."

items.sourceNote: blame the syllabus register — 都是課綱的錯 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
保持冷靜，然後怪課綱。
不是我不會，是課綱排太多。
不是我沒讀，是進度跑太快。
甩鍋給課綱是我考前唯一不會出錯的科目，
而且我這科一定滿分。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考差想找台階下的考生自嘲，傳到班群同學會一秒接龍「對啦都是課綱」。
variations: 可以加：「課綱無聲無息地承擔了我所有的失誤，謝謝你課綱。」
也能改：「我的成績不能代表我，只能代表課綱對我太狠。」

en.content:
Keep calm and blame the syllabus.
It's not that I can't do it — the syllabus crammed in too much.
It's not that I didn't study — the pace ran too fast.
Blaming the syllabus is the one subject I never get wrong before an exam,
and I'm definitely scoring full marks in it.
en.editorNote: For the student looking for an exit after a bad test — drop it in the group chat for instant 'yeah, it's the syllabus' replies.
variations: Add: "The syllabus silently absorbs all my mistakes. Thank you, syllabus."
Try: "My grade doesn't represent me. It just represents how brutal the syllabus was."

items.sourceNote: exams where confidence disappears register — 自信消失點 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
考場是我自信消失的地方。
進去前我覺得我什麼都會，
坐下來那一刻，自信就像鉛筆屑一樣被吹走了。
出來之後我才慢慢把它撿回來，
撿到一半，成績單來了，又全部掉光。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考前信心滿滿、考後瞬間崩盤的考生 OS，配張空蕩考場座位的照片超有戲。
variations: 可以加：「我的自信只在進考場前那十秒鐘存在過。」
也能改：「考場像個磁場，專門吸走我的自信跟記憶，順便附贈胃痛。」

en.content:
The exam hall is where my confidence goes to disappear.
Before I walk in I feel like I know everything;
the second I sit down, it gets swept away like pencil shavings.
I slowly pick it back up after I leave —
half-collected, the score report arrives, and it all drops again.
en.editorNote: For the confident-before, shattered-after exam arc — pair with a photo of an empty exam seat.
variations: Add: "My confidence only existed for the ten seconds before I walked in."
Try: "The exam hall is a magnet — it pulls out my confidence, my memory, and throws in a stomachache for free."

items.sourceNote: exams over brain has left the chat register — 大腦已離開聊天室 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
考完最後一科，
我的大腦傳了一句「已退出群組」就再也沒回我訊息。
別問我剛剛寫了什麼，
那個人已經離職了，現在這具身體由本能代班。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考完整個人放空、靈魂出竅的限動文案，配張眼神死的自拍效果最強。
variations: 可以加：「現在回我訊息的不是大腦，是慣性。」
也能改：「大腦：已讀不回。我：那我也下班。」

en.content:
Right after the last exam,
my brain typed "left the group" and never replied again.
Don't ask what I just wrote —
that guy already quit, and instinct is covering his shift.
en.editorNote: For the post-exam empty-shell mood — pair with a dead-eyed selfie.
variations: Add: "What's replying to you now isn't my brain. It's momentum."
Try: "Brain: seen, no reply. Me: cool, I'm clocking out too."

items.sourceNote: knowledge magically disappears register — 知識魔術消失 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
我發現自己有個超能力：
只要一坐進考場，腦袋裡的知識就會集體變不見。
它們昨晚還在，
今天早上就像被魔術師的黑布一蓋，
「噹」一聲，全部變成鴿子飛走了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 進考場瞬間全部忘光的考生 OS，配張一臉茫然盯著考卷的迷因正中紅心。
variations: 可以加：「考完走出考場，鴿子又自己飛回來了，時機抓得剛剛好。」
也能改：「我不是沒讀，我是把知識存在一個叫『考場外』的雲端。」

en.content:
Turns out I have a superpower:
the second I sit down for an exam, every fact in my head vanishes at once.
They were there last night.
This morning a magician threw a black cloth over them,
shouted "ta-da," and they all turned into pigeons and flew off.
en.editorNote: For the instant-amnesia-on-sitting-down moment — pair with a blank-stare-at-the-paper meme.
variations: Add: "The pigeons fly right back the moment I leave the hall. Impeccable timing."
Try: "I did study. I just saved everything to a cloud called 'outside the exam room.'"

items.sourceNote: walked out like a boss answered like nobody register — 走出來像老闆答題像菜鳥 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
我走出考場的氣勢，像剛簽下百億合約的老闆。
但我作答的樣子，像第一天上工還搞不清楚廁所在哪的菜鳥。
這兩個我之間的落差，
大概就是成績單存在的意義。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考完故作淡定、其實裡面亂七八糟的考生自嘲，配張背影離場的帥照超有反差。
variations: 可以加：「外表是 CEO，內在是試用期還沒過。」
也能改：「走出來的我跟寫考卷的我，建議互相不要認識比較好。」

en.content:
I walked out of the exam like a boss who just signed a billion-dollar deal.
But the way I actually answered? Like a first-day intern who still can't find the bathroom.
The gap between those two versions of me
is basically why score reports exist.
en.editorNote: For the fake-it-walking-out, chaos-inside energy — pair with a cool back-view exit shot.
variations: Add: "CEO on the outside, still on probation on the inside."
Try: "The me who walked out and the me who took the test should probably stay strangers."

items.sourceNote: committed relationship with textbooks register — 跟課本交往 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
這學期我談了一場最認真的戀愛，
對象是我的課本。
它佔據我每個夜晚、每個週末、每一頓沒吃完的飯。
結果考完那天它頭也不回地走了，
而且還把我的分數一起帶走當贍養費。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考前跟課本形影不離、考完被無情拋棄的考生 OS，配張抱著一疊書的照片超有戲。
variations: 可以加：「我們在一起最久，分手卻最痛，因為它連成績都要分走。」
也能改：「課本是這學期唯一沒缺席過我夜晚的對象，謝謝你，也再也不見。」

en.content:
This semester I was in the most committed relationship of my life —
with my textbook.
It took up every night, every weekend, every meal I never finished.
Then on exam day it walked off without looking back,
and took my grade with it as alimony.
en.editorNote: For the inseparable-then-dumped-by-your-textbook arc — pair with a photo hugging a stack of books.
variations: Add: "Longest relationship, worst breakup — it even split the score with me."
Try: "My textbook was the only one who never missed a single night this semester. Thanks, and goodbye forever."

items.sourceNote: when in doubt C in doubt register — 不會就選 C frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
選擇題不會的時候，我有一套縝密的策略：
看哪個選項最眼熟，看哪個排版最順，最後再相信一下直覺。
聽起來很科學，
其實翻成白話就是——閉著眼睛猜。
zh-tw.editorNote: 選擇題用玄學作答的考生自嘲，傳到班群一定有人回「我都選 C」。
variations: 可以加：「我的答案卡像心電圖，因為它記錄的是我每一次心虛的起伏。」
也能改：「考試教會我最實用的技能，是把『不知道』包裝成『我選好了』。」

en.content:
When I don't know a multiple-choice answer, I have a rigorous strategy:
pick the one that looks most familiar, the one that's laid out the cleanest, then trust my gut.
Sounds scientific.
Translated into plain English it means — guessing with my eyes closed.
en.editorNote: For the multiple-choice fortune-teller mood — drop it in the group chat and someone will reply 'I just always pick C.'
variations: Add: "My answer sheet looks like a heartbeat monitor — it records every spike of my self-doubt."
Try: "The most useful skill exams taught me is dressing up 'no idea' as 'final answer.'"

items.sourceNote: A+xiety wordplay register — 焦慮諧音梗在地化 frame

zh-tw.content:
別人準備考試靠的是 A 計畫、B 計畫，
我準備考試靠的是 A 焦慮、B 焦慮、C 焦慮。
等到 D 焦慮都用完了，
我才發現我根本沒有 E 計畫，只有 E 連發的胃痛。
zh-tw.editorNote: 期末焦慮型考生的限動文案，配張抓著肚子盯課本的自拍最有戲。
variations: 可以加：「我的讀書進度條沒在跑，焦慮進度條倒是 100% 滿格。」
也能改：「我不是在讀書，我是在用焦慮幫自己加油，加的還是劣質汽油。」

en.content:
Other people prep for exams with Plan A and Plan B.
I prep with Anxiety A, Anxiety B, Anxiety C.
By the time I'd used up Anxiety D,
I realized I never had a Plan E — just an E-shaped stomachache on repeat.
en.editorNote: For the finals-anxiety spiral — pair with a selfie clutching your stomach over a textbook.
variations: Add: "My study progress bar isn't moving. My anxiety bar, however, is sitting at 100%."
Try: "I'm not studying. I'm fueling myself with anxiety — and it's the cheap kind."

items.sourceNote: survived season finale of least favorite show register — 爛劇大結局 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
考完最後一科的感覺，
就像追完一部你根本不喜歡、卻被逼著看完的爛劇。
結局爛、過程更爛，
但你還是莫名其妙鬆了一口氣——
至少它播完了，至少我不用再追第二季。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考完那種「終於解脫但也沒比較開心」的複雜心情，配張關掉檯燈的限動超應景。
variations: 可以加：「我不是看完它，是熬到它自己播完。」
也能改：「這部叫《我的學期》的爛劇，總算下檔了，編劇我有意見但算了。」

en.content:
Finishing the last exam feels like
binge-watching a show you never liked but were forced to finish.
The ending was bad, the plot was worse,
but somehow you still let out a sigh of relief —
at least it's over, at least there's no season two to chase.
en.editorNote: For the 'finally free but not exactly happy' post-exam mood — pair with a switched-off-desk-lamp story.
variations: Add: "I didn't finish it. I just outlasted it until it ended on its own."
Try: "This trainwreck show called 'My Semester' is finally cancelled. I have notes for the writers, but never mind."

items.sourceNote: procaffeinating register — 咖啡因拖延諧音梗在地化 frame

zh-tw.content:
我發明了一個讀書步驟，叫做「先泡咖啡」。
問題是泡完咖啡要等它涼，等涼的時候要滑一下手機，
滑完手機咖啡冷了要再泡一杯。
於是我一整晚都在準備讀書，唯獨沒有讀到書。
zh-tw.editorNote: 用泡咖啡當拖延藉口的考生 OS，配張桌上三杯沒喝完的咖啡照超寫實。
variations: 可以加：「咖啡因進到我身體裡的唯一作用，是讓我更清醒地拖延。」
也能改：「我不是邊喝咖啡邊讀書，我是邊讀咖啡邊喝書，順序好像哪裡不對。」

en.content:
I invented a study step called "first, make coffee."
Problem is, after making it I have to wait for it to cool, and while it cools I scroll my phone,
and after scrolling the coffee's cold so I make another cup.
So I spent all night preparing to study — and never actually studied.
en.editorNote: For the coffee-as-procrastination crowd — pair with a photo of three half-finished mugs on your desk.
variations: Add: "The only thing caffeine does for me is make me more alert while I procrastinate."
Try: "I'm not drinking coffee while studying. I'm studying the coffee while drinking the book. Something's off."

items.sourceNote: stressed blessed caffeinated register — 三連狀態在地化 frame

zh-tw.content:
目前狀態：壓力滿、福報空、咖啡因爆表。
三個指數裡有兩個是紅的，
而那個沒爆的，是因為它從學期初就一直是零。
沒事，至少咖啡因幫我撐到現在。
zh-tw.editorNote: 期末週身心崩潰但還在硬撐的考生限動，配張黑眼圈自拍加一杯咖啡剛剛好。
variations: 可以加：「支撐我的不是夢想，是這杯第幾杯我已經算不清楚的咖啡。」
也能改：「壓力是滿的，電量是空的，這台人類已進入低耗電模式。」

en.content:
Current status: stress full, blessings empty, caffeine off the charts.
Two of the three gauges are in the red,
and the one that isn't has been sitting at zero since week one.
It's fine — at least the caffeine got me this far.
en.editorNote: For the finals-week running-on-fumes mood — pair with an eye-bags selfie and a coffee cup.
variations: Add: "What's holding me up isn't dreams. It's this coffee — and I've lost count of which cup it is."
Try: "Stress: full. Battery: empty. This human has entered low-power mode."

items.sourceNote: studying like my grade depends on it because it does register — 賭上成績 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
我現在讀書的拼命程度，好像成績決定了我的人生。
冷靜想一下——
它好像真的決定了我的人生。
所以這不是過度認真，是遲到了一整個學期才開始的合理恐慌。
zh-tw.editorNote: 期末前一晚突然頓悟、開始狂讀的考生 OS，配張深夜書堆爆滿的桌面照超有感。
variations: 可以加：「我用考前一晚的速度，補完整學期的進度，這叫物理上的奇蹟。」
也能改：「我不是臨時抱佛腳，我是臨時抱整座廟。」

en.content:
I'm studying like my whole life depends on this grade.
Then I stopped to think —
it kind of actually does.
So this isn't me being dramatic; it's reasonable panic that just showed up a full semester late.
en.editorNote: For the night-before epiphany cram — pair with a photo of a desk buried in books at 2am.
variations: Add: "Cramming a whole semester into one night is, physically speaking, a miracle."
Try: "I'm not clinging to the Buddha's leg last minute. I'm clutching the entire temple."
